programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britains sharpest armchair critics share more of their sharp, insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the weeks biggest and best shows on television.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: The nations most romantic restaurant reopens with Fred Sirieix leading the way. Derek and June are a pair of music-loving romantics in their golden years. Mike, a widowed dad, searches for someone who understands the weight of grief.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer are in Mapperley with Sue and Richard, who agree their home is no longer fit for purpose but cant decide whether to stay or move on.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil catch up with young couple Wendy and Simon, who were desperate to find their first home in Derby, and their oldest ever house hunters Margot and Henry, in Berkshire. After nearly 50 years in the same home, Margot and Henry wanted to move to something trendy and modern. Or did Henry really want to move home?

programme.title: Our Welsh Chapel Dream
programme.desc: Keith Brymer Jones and his partner Marj throw themselves into the restoration of a derelict chapel in Wales. As they explore their new home, it appears that theyre not alone, the local pigeons have moved in.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In South Wales, farm girl Claire treats her guests to a traditional, hearty Welsh spread and farm-themed games. Will her farm charm impress? Or will her night end up a mucky mess?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at the Three Horseshoes in Norfolk, where married couple Fiona and Michael hope to gallop to victory with the homely vibes at their traditional country pub. But someones shower leaves them feeling dour.

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: On the Costa Blanca, Abi and Darren plan a disco revolution. In France, will juggling a working business and renovations prove too much for restauranteurs Andrew and Richard?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Chris and Kay are looking for their perfect retirement home to share with their cats, but cant agree on where it should be. Will they pick Cardigan Bay in west Wales or Mar Menor in Spain?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: What Happened Next
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman revisits dad and daughter Steven and Stephanie in Charente. Laura Hamiltons with Neelesh and Angie, who bought an apartment in Estepona in 2019.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Swindon, international DJ Mark Eteson hopes to create a hands-in-the-air experience with his rave themed evening. Mark prepares an Ibiza inspired menu.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Amateur dramatics enthusiast Michaela Kearns plans a glamour themed evening including melted chocolate with dipping treats.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Financial adviser Scott Hillier hopes to blow the competition away with a Wild West evening. Scott is the joker of the group, but makes a shocking confession about how he met his wife.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Direct sales manager Sally Rachael hosts a `girls night in themed evening, with mysteriously titled dishes that leave her guests with no idea what theyre going to be served.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Swindon, alternative therapist Gill Bright has big plans for an `upstairs downstairs Edwardian evening, featuring some sophisticated food followed by circle dancing to Bob Marley.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Dee and Joe have decided to swap Ireland for Portugal and make a permanent move to their favourite town of Albufeira. They want a two-bedroom apartment thats big enough for them and their daughter. Jean Johansson shows them what their £155k can buy.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil and Kirstie catch up with cautious first time buyers Sundeep and Rupreet in Harrow and postcode picky Hilary and Rob in Hitchin, Hertfordshire. Phil had the tricky task of widening the search beyond Hitchin. Once the couple saw what they could get for their money further out, it wasnt long before one property made it all worthwhile. Theyve been in their new home for just over a year.

programme.title: Our Welsh Chapel Dream
programme.desc: Keith Brymer Jones and his partner Marj throw themselves into the restoration of a derelict chapel in Wales. As they explore their new home, it appears that theyre not alone, the local pigeons have moved in.

programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer are in Mapperley with Sue and Richard, who agree their home is no longer fit for purpose but cant decide whether to stay or move on.

programme.desc: Britains sharpest armchair critics share more of their sharp, insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the weeks biggest and best shows on television.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: The nations most romantic restaurant reopens with Fred Sirieix leading the way. Derek and June are a pair of music-loving romantics in their golden years. Mike, a widowed dad, searches for someone who understands the weight of grief.

programme.title: Rhod Gilbert: The Book of John
programme.desc: Rhod Gilbert is raw, personal, and brutally honest, filmed live at the Wales Millennium Centre in Cardiff. Rhod talks about hitting rock bottom, and just when he thought things cant get any worse, he met a bloke called John.

programme.title: Millionaire Hoarders
programme.desc: Retired artists Carole and Roger have crammed their nine-bed home with objects from around the world. Will they part with possessions to raise much-needed cash?

programme.title: Super Surgeons: A Chance at Life
programme.desc: Ex-navy pilot Rich has a massive 16cm tumour running from his jaw to his heart. Meanwhile, nearly all the organs in Tracys pelvis need removal to combat her stage 4 bowel cancer.

programme.title: Lake District Rescue
programme.desc: The team are called out to a man whos broken his leg on Scafell Pike. With darkness closing in, leaving him in plummeting temperatures could be life-threatening.

programme.title: Lake District Rescue
programme.desc: The team are called out to a man whos broken his leg on Scafell Pike. With darkness closing in, leaving him in plummeting temperatures could be life-threatening.

programme.title: Extreme Tow Truckers
programme.desc: New South Wales is hit with the heaviest rain in 70 years, which leads to flooding. in Queensland, driver Mackie puts everything on the line while crossing the murky Mary River for a towing mission.

programme.title: Mud Mountain Haulers
programme.desc: Craig Lebeau and his team are pushed to the limit when their main driver gets stuck in a serious accident with a fully loaded truck. They wonder if the money is worth the risks.

programme.title: Cruise TV with LoveitBookit
programme.desc: A definitive one-stop shop for all things cruise, bringing you the hottest destinations and the latest deals to ensure that your next cruise ship holiday is your greatest one yet.

programme.title: Entertainment News On 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: Winter Road Rescue
programme.desc: Snowplough drivers and patrols are prepared to work all day and all night to keep UK roadways clear from obstruction when winter sweeps the nation. Fearless in the face of a cold front, these men and women are there to assist when disaster strikes.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: A driver nearly causes carnage to make sure his takeaway stays hot, a large cannabis stash is found at the scene of a crash, and a drunk driver gets caught short.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Profiling the work of high-speed police interception units around the country with some of the most dangerous pursuits and shocking footage ever captured. Exploring what it takes to bring order to chaos.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Phil Broughton pulls over a young lad in an old Vauxhall thats suspected of being on cloned plates. The biggest surprise of all comes when Phil discovers its the drivers 15th birthday.

programme.title: Kansas Raiders
programme.desc: Western tale about the exploits of a young Jesse James and his involvement with a ruthless band of vigilantes during the Civil War. When the leader of the group dies, James steps up to assume command, but his inexperience proves costly.

programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: Kansas Raiders

programme.title: Decision at Sundown
programme.desc: A gunman is obsessed with tracking down and killing the man who stole his tramp wife. However, a gun duel reveals the truth.

programme.title: Entertainment News On 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: Decision at Sundown
programme.desc: A gunman is obsessed with tracking down and killing the man who stole his tramp wife. However, a gun duel reveals the truth.

programme.title: Trucking Heavy
programme.desc: In Manchester, Sam aka Hiab princess must deliver three huge shipping containers to a remote farm. Meanwhile, in Birmingham, Marks in charge of moving a 57-foot-long canal boat to a marina.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Yorkshires traffic cops are in hot pursuit of some criminals dragging a generator with just one wheel across the county. Also, a van nearly causes carnage when it crashes through a level crossing.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Eight police cars and the eye in the sky hunt down a high powered Porsche Cayenne that is causing carnage. Undertaking at high speeds and goading the interceptors, the driver even manages to take out several police cars.

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britains Speeders
programme.desc: PC Will Hunter gets out the breathalyser for a driver - will he be over the limit the morning after the night before? And police pull over a suspected cloned car.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Pursued by a helicopter and a team of armed response vehicles, two men armed with machetes and a sawn-off shotgun make a dramatic escape on a motorbike. Dog handler Duncan joins the firearms squad to close the area and help hunt the villains.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell
programme.desc: Jamies team are in for a freezing all-night rescue operation when an out-of-control snow plough skids on the deathly highway, slamming into two trucks.

programme.title: Motorway: Hell on the Highway
programme.desc: The panel of drivers and experts assess more traffic incidents including illegal road racers on the motorway, heart-stopping near misses, and the dangers of drinking and driving up close.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Their first case takes them to Oregon to investigate the unsolved murders of several high school classmates, whom `Spooky Mulder believes have been experimented on by aliens.

programme.title: Mud Mountain Haulers
programme.desc: When Craigs little brother Brent cuts corners to get extra wood off the mountain, a mistake shuts the entire operation down. With the business hanging in the balance, Craig needs to decide if he can bail Brent out.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Outback legend Steve Grahame is hauling three million dollars-worth of vital power generating equipment to an isolated community in the far North West of Australia - Kalumburu.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: A £300,000 supercar has crashed in a Surrey wood. Daniel and Sean have to whip out a chainsaw to cut their own exit route. A 14-ton road sweeper needs recovering on a farmyard.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: A £300,000 supercar has crashed in a Surrey wood. Daniel and Sean have to whip out a chainsaw to cut their own exit route. A 14-ton road sweeper needs recovering on a farmyard.

programme.title: Skin AandE
programme.desc: Two ladies keep Dr Dev Shah busy: one has a large lipoma on her back, the other a cyst on her forehead. Plus, nineteen-year-old Abby hopes Dr Natalia Spierings can rid her of lumps on her ears.

programme.title: Eggheads
programme.desc: Challengers `Jays Virtual Quiz take on the Eggheads. The team is named after a virtual pub quiz of the same name, which Jay started during lockdown in 2020 on YouTube to raise money for charities - and it has raised over £1 million.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A runaway cyclist dips into a house to catch his breath. A deputy tries to cut a man some slack despite his mistakes. The owners of an empty house call the police when they hear someone else inside.

programme.title: Bargain Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Wayne and husband Des are cooking up hearty meals to give to the local homeless community. The charitable couple show us their next project: refurbishing a womens refuge centre.

programme.title: Shoplifters: At War With The Law
programme.desc: In Newton Abbot, a pensioner was shopping when a woman reached into her bag and stole an envelope of money. In Coventry, Mal spots a suspected drug user who already has a lifetime ban. In London, a suspicious duo enters a major department store.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: The traffic cops clamp down on young drivers causing danger on north Yorkshires roads. In the Yorkshire Dales, the traffic cops hunt down a young man believed to be drug driving and whos failed to stop in a suspected stolen car.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: A prolific car thief, with a string of convictions, crashes and rolls a stolen car at over 100mph. In Harrogate, the hunt for a disqualified driver leads to a high-speed car chase.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Near York, a young driver in a stolen car is on a suspected high behind the wheel. The police must make a move before the reckless man can join a busy motorway and cause more mayhem.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The team tackle a lairy drunk, a runaway knifeman, a suspected drug dealer, an overturned trailer full of cows and a ruptured gas main.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A stick of dynamite is brought into Carlisles main police station, a gun is spotted in a city-centre bar and Duncan receives a shock when a cyclist who has been crushed and trapped under a car turns out to be someone he knows.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Cumbrias elite interceptor teams are called out to deal with a suspect gunman, a pedestrian under a car and to destroy a cannabis farm, and a Reliant Robin is bid a fiery farewell.

programme.title: Rogue Claimers
programme.desc: A serial scammer attempts to make identical travel insurance claims and a caravan owner claims for a theft that never happened.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Edens confused, trying to understand why Remis decided to move out even though he has a head injury.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Cash feels the pressure from both sides, worrying that hes doing harm by lying to Eden, but knowing he made a promise to Remi to keep the tumour a secret.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Candid interviews with the staff reveal first-hand that medical professionals need healthcare too.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Lead nurse Hannah is running Barnsley casualty, but today she faces an extra challenge - a shortage of the porters who keep patients moving through the department and free up the bays and cubicles for the new emergency cases.

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red
programme.desc: A man has been crushed by a forklift truck and sustained a serious leg injury, and a 22-year-old woman is trapped in her car with a badly injured ankle after a high-speed collision.

programme.title: AandE After Dark
programme.desc: Lifting the lid on the night shift as experienced by AandE workers, with exclusive access to Hull Royal Infirmary. The night-time challenges facing NHS staff are captured in their raw form.

programme.title: Skin AandE
programme.desc: Dr Toby is spellbound by his patient, Gideon, Prestons part-time witch, and Dr Natalia Spierings tries to help a young woman with a scalp condition usually found in middle-aged men.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Candid interviews with the staff reveal first-hand that medical professionals need healthcare too.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: A man with potential spine injuries is given pain relief while waiting for scan results.

programme.title: Skin AandE
programme.desc: Dr Natalia Spierings helps Justin who has a genetic condition which means his skin is covered in lumps made up of nerves. Plus, Dr Dev Shah is asked to remove a cyst named Egbert.

programme.desc: Retired estate agent Fiona now spends her time helping out her local dog charity ADANA. Wedding planner Louise is grafting hard to dress a church for a couples big day.

programme.title: Bargain Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: New character Keith and his family run a busy butchers shop catering to Brits in a lovely village near the holiday hotspot of Alicante.

programme.title: Shoplifters: At War With The Law
programme.desc: At West Orchards, Paige receives an SOS from a new store that a dastardly shoplifting duo are back. Farrah McNutt is on the case of a duo, who work together to hit a small convenience store.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Drink-driving, drug use and atrocious weather all contribute to trouble for the traffic police as they investigate cases including a driver who is spotted taking drugs whilst behind the wheel of a car transporter.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Near York, a young man who has stolen his grandfathers car leads the police into a bizarre and dangerous pursuit that ends in a trip to hospital for the youngster. Meanwhile, police elsewhere track two suspected fuel thieves.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Near York, officers arrest a car full of suspects with a large haul of drugs whilst they were heading for a music festival. In addition, a reckless driver with a history of violence tries to outrun the police.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A serial offender gives officers the runaround, a high-speed pursuit comes to a painful finish, the occupants of a 4x4 need rescuing after overturning on treacherous ice, and the interceptors are called on a mucky mercy mission after two of their own get caught in a sticky situation.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Angus and Sean have to smash down a door in order to save a mans life, veteran interceptor Gordon picks up a gruesome twosome on the M6, and a fleeing Land Rover rams two cop cars in a bid to get away.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Glen rushes to help a woman trapped inside a burning car, Hayley is on patrol during `Black Eye Friday, and Ross and John are called in to help a victim who has been bound and gagged. Meanwhile, Duggie and Gareth deal with a bullock breakout, Steve gets a bad boy racer to phone his mum after misbehaving, and a motorway pursuit is bought to an abrupt end with a perfectly timed textbook shunt.

programme.title: Rogue Claimers
programme.desc: A couple go on the run when their claim of being burgled at knifepoint is exposed as fraud. Pub CCTV cameras show a cyclist taking a brewery for a ride.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Cash feels the pressure from both sides, worrying that hes doing harm by lying to Eden, but knowing he made a promise to Remi to keep the tumour a secret.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Kerrie catches Dana in a whirlwind of emotions, and in her vulnerable state, Dana finally opens up to her a little, sharing about her struggles with Sonny.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: The doctors deal with a woman in the midst of a panic attack, a chronic asthmatic, a man who can only eat boiled eggs and a harrowing diagnosis of stomach cancer.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Junior doctor Tariq Khan urgently assesses a man who has arrived with a 13cm-long laceration on his thigh from a DIY accident with an angle grinder. Registrar Chris Carson treats a man found with head injuries at the bottom of a flight of stairs.

programme.title: Street Cops: Catching the Yobs
programme.desc: A man and his dangerous dogs have terrorised locals for months. Officers put a specialist team together to bring the owner and his animals in - but it leads to a tense stand-off.

programme.title: 999 Critical Condition
programme.desc: Wayne is rushed in by helicopter after his parachute fails and he is slammed into the ground 100 feet below. Marc has also suffered a significant trauma after a head on collision with another vehicle.

programme.title: Skin AandE
programme.desc: Dr Natalia Spierings tackles one of the biggest lipomas of her career, Dr Emma McMullen helps a bride whos six weeks away from I do; Dr Adil Sheraz treats a patient with a face cyst.

programme.title: The Incident Room
programme.desc: In 2013, teen Jayden Parkinson went missing. Detectives suspect her murder, and have questions for her ex-boyfriend. Has Jayden been killed and, if so, where is her body?

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Nurse Ennis changes the dressings on Antonias finger, following a nasty accident with a coffee grinder.

programme.desc: A dog is brought in with its hair so matted it can hardly see, and a man is suspected of violence towards three cats.

programme.title: Crikey! Its the Irwins
programme.desc: Terri, Bindi and Robert prepare Croc One, Steve Irwins research ship, for a special mission to release an endangered sea turtle back into the wild.

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: A new season brings new challenges as Villalobos Rescue Centre expands beyond New Orleans opening a satellite shelter in nearby Assumption Parish.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: A couple struggle to stop their feuding felines, Bitten and Chompy, from fighting. Can Jackson help these aptly named cats and their family live together in peace?

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: A deaf and blind cat stops using its litter box and becomes hostile toward its owners and a new kitten, a couple puts their family plans on hold due to violent feuding between their dog and cat.

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: Game Wardens beef up patrols for the short pronghorn season. A deer must be captured and moved from an industrial site, and an injured hawk is rushed to a rehabber.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: When a dog is rushed into the clinic foaming at the mouth, Dr Jeff must act fast. And when he meets Penelope the Pig, he faces a surgery hes never done before.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete and the crew rekindle the Treehouse Workshop and come together to build a treehouse escape with a group of young carpenters from Sawhorse Revolution.

programme.title: The Pool Master
programme.desc: Anthony attempts to seamlessly blend his man-made pool area into an outdoor loving couples natural, 300-acre landscape where their grandchildren can safely explore, all this while fighting of Texas-sized bugs.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: Otto must move the outhouse due to frozen soil. Eivin takes Eve on her first deer-hunt on Afognak Island and Atz and sons gather trees for a big new project.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: The Wolfpack kids have divided their land between themselves. Theyre keen to finish building their houses in time as Noah prepares for the babys arrival.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of the Death Cat Barn
programme.desc: The AIMS team investigates the mysterious barn where they heard the roar of the Cherokee Death Cat. Their quest to catch the ferocious feline leads to a shocking discovery for which no one is prepared.

programme.title: Crikey! Its the Irwins
programme.desc: Terri, Bindi and Robert prepare Croc One, Steve Irwins research ship, for a special mission to release an endangered sea turtle back into the wild.

programme.title: Great White Abyss
programme.desc: A team of experts go to great white hotspot Guadalupe Island to look for the biggest sharks of their kind in a combination of deep-water cage and submarine dives. Before, a 20-foot female showed herself and now they are looking for bigger.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete and the crew rekindle the Treehouse Workshop and come together to build a treehouse escape with a group of young carpenters from Sawhorse Revolution.

programme.title: Alag
programme.desc: When an old widow passes away, the police searches his house and finds his son locked in the basement. They take the boy to an institution, where it is discovered that he possesses supernatural powers.

programme.title: Marshal

programme.title: Mr. Natwarlal

programme.title: Kaun Kare Kurbanie
programme.desc: Inspector Arjun Singh is assigned to a case involving the murders and sexual molestations of young girls, only to find that his son may be the prime suspect.

programme.title: Haathon Ki Lakeeren
programme.desc: When Geetas lover, Lalit leaves her to go abroad, she secretly gives birth to their child, but Geetas mother tells her that the boy was stillborn, and sends him to an orphanage. Years later, Geeta and Lalit reunite, but are told that they are unable to have children, and Geetas mother decides to tell them about their son.

programme.title: Pyar Ki Kahani
programme.desc: Ram Chand, working a simple job despite his qualifications, meets Ravi Chand who is on the verge of suicide. Convincing him to stay alive and then move in with him, Ram helps Ravi find a job, which in turn finds him a wife. When Ram himself finds what he thinks may be a suitable wife he sends a picture to Ravi for approval, but he reproaches him over his choice and is elusive in his reasons why.

programme.title: Pip and Posy
programme.desc: Posy gets Pips kite stuck in a tree when he isnt looking, and tries to cover up by telling him a fib. When they cant find the kite, Posy has to own up.

programme.title: Pip and Posy

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet
programme.desc: Asia is the largest and most extreme continent on our planet, stretching from the Arctic Circle in the north to the tropical forests on the equator. The animals here face the hottest deserts, tallest jungles and highest mountains found anywhere on Earth. But the continent has not always looked like this. These extreme worlds were created when India collided with the rest of Asia 30 million years ago, shaping the continent as we know it today.

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Past with Janina Ramirez
programme.desc: Janina is in Turkey, tracking a young explorer who found the worlds oldest city and rewrote the beginning of civilisation, until his reputation was destroyed by scandal.

programme.title: Call My Bluff
programme.desc: Robert Robinson hosts as Frank Muir, Prunella Gee and Humphrey Burton take on Patrick Campbell, Hannah Gordon and Bryan Marshall in the panel game of definitions and deceptions.

programme.title: Face the Music
programme.desc: Question master Joseph Cooper invites viewers to match their musical wits against Joyce Grenfell, Brian Redhead, Alvar Lidell. With guest musician David Atherton.

programme.title: The Secret Rules of Modern Living: Algorithms
programme.desc: Mathematician Professor Marcus du Sautoy demystifies the hidden world of algorithms.

programme.title: Bridget Riley: Painting the Line
programme.desc: The story of a true visionary of British art. Bridget Riley has been challenging our perception through painting for over 60 years, with radical work that has transformed how we look at art and invites us to feel with our eyes.

programme.title: Nature and Us: A History through Art
programme.desc: James Fox explores the art of the ancient world to reveal the story of our earliest relationships with nature. From the art of prehistoric hunters and the advent of agriculture and our first cities to the arrival the great faiths.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin is served up a treat at a Wimbledon flat, Martel likes the character at a Sunderland property, and Dion descends on Doncaster, where he dishes out a yellow card to a developer who hasnt viewed his new auction purchase.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: The show is in Staffordshire, home of the world-renowned Potteries. Christina Trevanion meets a man with more than 1,200 Staffordshire figures, which he stores in a specially built room on the side of his house! Meanwhile, two teams go hunting for antiques at Bingley Hall in the company of their experts, Izzie Balmer and Nick Hall. In the red jackets are married couple Agnes and Irfan, and in blue are colleagues Lorraine and Hannah.

programme.title: Spotlight
programme.desc: Marie-Louise Connolly investigates the difficult choice facing new mums who experience serious mental health issues after giving birth: in Northern Ireland, treatment means being separated from their babies. This is the only part of the UK without a specialist Mother and Baby Unit that would that allow in-patient treatment with their baby beside them.

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: Ally and son Noah apply the salon treatment to go head-to-head with mainland breeders.

programme.title: Designing the Hebrides
programme.desc: With Banjos design reputation growing, the Isle of Mull Rugby Club hire him to redesign their bar to reflect the clubs rich history. But with a large space to fill, and little knowledge of sport, Banjo is out of his creative comfort zone. With only a few days to complete the makeover, Banjo must face up to his past to find a way to complete this tricky brief.

programme.title: Designing the Hebrides
programme.desc: To launch a new spirit distilled on the cheese farm where he lives, Banjo is asked by farm owner Chris to design a rustic gin tasting bar using salvaged materials found on the farm. This design is deeply personal journey for Banjo, as he aims to give back to the people who welcomed him and his husband Ro into their community.

programme.title: This is BBC Scotland
programme.desc: Launches Sunday 24 February at 7pm with comedy, drama, documentaries, news and sport.

programme.title: Reporting Scotland
programme.desc: The latest news and weather from around Scotland.

programme.title: Our Lives
programme.desc: Sarah the Lumberjill is the fourth generation of her family to take up the saw, working across the forests of the Central Highlands of Scotland, where her family have worked for 150 years. After some of the worst storms to hit Scotland in a lifetime, Sarah, her dad Ralph and brother Ralphy are busier than ever - though with Ralphs health in decline, Sarah has a lot to learn before taking over one day.

programme.title: Life On the Bay
programme.desc: A park veteran and resident reveals his passion for bowling at the local club as he challenges manager Steven to a game.

programme.title: Life On the Bay
programme.desc: The caravan park owned and run by three generations of the Wallace family plays a big part in the community on the Fife coast. Manager Steven has volunteered at the nearby RNLI station since he was 17 and is on call. A park resident has recently joined a another kind of community, the bays wild swimmers, and goes for a dip with friends. Meanwhile, head chef James welcomes a new recruit to the kitchen, and the sun shines on a fund-raising fete.

programme.title: Designing the Hebrides
programme.desc: Banjo has been commissioned by married couple Jhennia and Rachel to transform the Puffer Pub on the tiny slate island of Easedale. The historic pub is at the beating heart of Easedales population of just 60, so Banjos design needs to hit the mark.

programme.title: Designing the Hebrides
programme.desc: Herbalist Amanda has her own apothecary in the Outer Hebrides. The space where she bottles and showcases her products is lacklustre. Banjo and his team are up against it to transform the huge, dull space into a beautiful and functional apothecary.

programme.title: River City
programme.desc: A well-meaning Scarlett accidently causes a rift between Bob and Alice, but when Sam steps in, it confirms her newfound feelings. Frustrated at being slighted by Harry, Alex makes his risky plans clear to Lenny, Amber finds a lifesaver in Dean, and Gillians devastated by Emmas actions.

programme.title: Two Doors Down
programme.desc: Cathy invites the neighbours round to enjoy an extravagant spread of posh shop-bought nibbles to celebrate Colins dads birthday, but despite her big show of being the ultimate hostess, long-suffering Beth has to step in and rescue the party.

programme.title: Scotcast
programme.desc: Conversation about Scotlands biggest news stories, hosted by Martin Geissler.

programme.title: Limmys Show
programme.desc: Limmys addiction to gaming really gets in the way of the show; he is determined to get those everyday conversations just right as he rehearses some opening gambits and he suggests a well placed mime might get you out of some pretty serious scrapes. Also something weird keeps happening with Limmys Facebook photos and no matter how hard he tries, he just cant escape the cameras.

programme.title: Waterloo Road
programme.desc: Waterloo Road is in mourning after a fatal car crash that killed one of its pupils, Adam, and left another, Holly, in a coma.

programme.title: Blade Runner 2049
programme.desc: Officer K, a new blade runner for the Los Angeles Police Department, unearths a long-buried secret that has the potential to plunge whats left of society into chaos. His discovery leads him on a quest to find Rick Deckard, a former blade runner whos been missing for 30 years.

programme.title: Men of the Manosphere

programme.title: EastEnders Investigates: The Manosphere
programme.desc: Documentary on misogyny.

programme.title: Tommy: The Good. The Bad. The Fury
programme.desc: Tommy faces his comeback fight in Budapest, and the pressure is on. How will he cope after nearly two years out of the ring?

programme.title: Tommy: The Good. The Bad. The Fury
programme.desc: After the success of his comeback fight, Tommys road to redemption hits a major setback - his hand is injured again and needs eight weeks total rest before doctors will know if he can fight again. The last time he couldnt train, his life spiralled out of control, so now Tommy throws himself into a frenzy of activity: a TV appearance on The Wheel, family days out with Bambi, and a final push to finish the home he hopes Molly and Bambi will soon return to.

programme.title: Tommy: The Good. The Bad. The Fury
programme.desc: Tommys recovery is back on track after he and John put his hand to the test. The pair are training again, and the search for Tommys next opponent begins. Eager to make the most of family time, Tommy splashes out on a £90,000 motor home for family trips with Molly and Bambi and takes his mum out for lunch and a long-overdue catch-up.

programme.title: Tommy: The Good. The Bad. The Fury
programme.desc: Tommy realises just how far he and Molly have come since the separation, but after completing a series of intense physical challenges, he has to deal with a social media backlash.

programme.title: Tommy: The Good. The Bad. The Fury
programme.desc: Tommy receives some terrible news that reminds him to live life to its fullest. Will he manage the biggest physical challenge yet?

programme.title: Tommy: The Good. The Bad. The Fury

programme.title: The Catch-Up
programme.desc: A round-up of the days news.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve and the team embark on a truly incredible adventure across the vast island of Madagascar. Many of the creatures they meet cannot be found anywhere else in the world. From gremlin-like aye-ayes to Madagascars most ferocious carnivore.

programme.title: The Weakest Link
programme.desc: Host Romesh Ranganathan is joined by contestants Marcus Brigstocke, Rita Simons, Jamie Laing, Nicki Chapman, Babatunde Aleshe, Yvette Fielding, Tony Blackburn and Chunkz.

programme.title: Alan Carrs Picture Slam
programme.desc: This week, Alan puts three new teams through their picture paces: married couple Nic and Corin from Essex, father-son duo Alex and David from Aberdeenshire and Glasgow and friends Abbie and Maddy from Durham. Theyll be pitted against each other across four fun and furious rounds against the clock - including the brand new Picture Twist and buzzer rounds - with one pair making it to the final Super Slam. Will they be able to tell their kangaroo from their Doctor Who and take home the jackpot?

programme.title: RuPauls Drag Race UK vs the World
programme.desc: The queens give drag makeovers to Team GB Olympians Greg Rutherford, Shanaze Reade, Molly Thompson-Smith, Celia Quansah and Daniel Jervis. Pop superstar Anastacia guest-judges.

programme.title: Cat Person
programme.desc: A college student who works at a movie theatre goes on an awkward date with an older man who may be a murderer.

programme.title: The Beauty Queen and the Catfish
programme.desc: When a mysterious doctor starts flirting with a former beauty queen online, she smells a love rat. But when she starts digging, the mystery deepens, and nothing is as it seems.

programme.title: The Beauty Queen and the Catfish
programme.desc: The women work together to reveal the true identity of their catfish. However, as more victims and evidence come to light, the women are forced to take matters into their own hands.

programme.title: The Beauty Queen and the Catfish
programme.desc: With the perpetrator now investigated by the police as a serial offender, questions turn to what drove them to become one of the UKs prolific catfish - and why cant they stop?

programme.title: Men of the Manosphere
programme.desc: James Blake joins three young men to explore why theyve turned to the so-called manosphere to achieve success, and how its influenced their real lives.

programme.title: Question Time
programme.desc: Features a studio audience quizzing top politicians on the events of the day. The panel surrounding presenter Fiona Bruce is composed of at least one member of the three major parties.

programme.title: This Is BBC TWO
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two.

programme.title: Dragons Den
programme.desc: In this episode, the pitches are a nose-friendly home composter, a GP with a medical bag redesign, a DIY drinks entrepreneur, and a husband-and-wife team with a pre-loved kitchen business.

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Highlights from the FA Cup fifth round, with a place in the quarter-finals at stake. League One Mansfield take on Premier League leaders Arsenal, Chelsea travel to Wrexham, Norwich go to Leeds, and Newcastle face Manchester City.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: Twenty-four hours a day, the latest national and international stories as they break.

programme.title: Politics Live
programme.desc: Jo Coburn invites a panel of guests to share their opinions on the newsmaking stories of the day.

programme.title: !mpossible
programme.desc: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

programme.title: Unbeatable
programme.desc: Jason Manford hosts the quiz show where players face a question and pick from a board of six rankable answers. Some answers are good, but only one is unbeatable.

programme.title: The Boss
programme.desc: Susan Calman hosts the quiz show where being in control is everything. Who will emerge as the Boss and walk away with the cash? Only the strongest players will survive the game.

programme.title: Weatherman Walking
programme.desc: Derek leaves his weather map behind, dons his walking boots and heads for the hills above Aberdyfi to explore the surrounding countryside above the Dyfi estuary followed by a walk on the beach.

programme.title: New Zealand: Earths Mythical Islands
programme.desc: Isolated since the time of the dinosaurs, New Zealands wildlife has been left to its own devices - with surprising consequences. Its ancient forests are still stalked by predators from the Jurassic era. Its also one of the most geologically active countries on Earth. From Kiwis with their giant eggs, to forest-dwelling penguins and helicopter-riding sheep dogs, meet the astonishing creatures and resilient people who must rise to the challenges of their beautiful, dramatic and demanding home.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the team uncover a treasure trove of unusual objects including an original hand-written poem by W B Yeats, examples of Meissen from the earliest days of European porcelain manufacture, and a rare silver tobacco box rescued from a London dustbin.

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Paul Martin heads to Malvern for another valuation day where Kate Bateman and Adam Partridge lead the team of experts. Adam finds a set of playing cards with hand-written predictions, and Kate meets a mystery monk - a bronze statue that has everyone wondering what it was used for. Paul visits Whitley Court, the huge ruins of a former stately home, and uncovers its fascinating history.

programme.title: Richard Osmans House of Games
programme.desc: Former winners Chris McCausland, Claire Richards, Adele Roberts and Olly Smith test their general knowledge skills on this weeks Richard Osmans House of Games: Champions.

programme.title: Do You Know Your Place?
programme.desc: Vernon Kay and unreliable guide Paul Gorton challenge Owain Wyn Evans, Greg Rutherford and Abby Cook to separate surprising truths from tall tales in Belfast.

programme.title: Global Eye
programme.desc: Bringing forensic journalism from all corners of the world by BBC Eye, the World Services critically acclaimed investigative unit, and featuring expert global correspondents getting to the heart of the biggest international stories.

programme.title: Grand Tours of Scotlands Lochs
programme.desc: This Grand Tour starts at Loch Glashan above Loch Fyne, where Paul travels back in time to learn how to paddle a coracle. At Old Castle Lachlan, he dabbles in Victorian virtual reality, courtesy of George Washington Wilson and his stereoscopic camera. At the open-air museum of Auchindrain, Paul follows Queen Victoria on the trail of poverty tourism, before having fun with the tale of MacPhunn - a man who cheated the noose.

programme.title: Mastermind
programme.desc: Clive Myrie asks the questions in the first semi-final. The specialist subjects include Fleabag, Michael Faraday, the presidency of Ronald Reagan and British marine invertebrates.

programme.title: University Challenge
programme.desc: The quarter-final stage continues. Having won one match already, the teams know that if they can win again here, theyll reach the semi-finals. Amol Rajan asks the questions.

programme.title: AI Confidential with Hannah Fry
programme.desc: Investigating the hidden link between murder suspect Luigi Mangione and the controversial use of AI algorithms in healthcare.

programme.title: Small Prophets
programme.desc: Strange things are happening in Marvin Gardens, and theyre starting to attract unwanted attention. Its time for Kacey and Michael to exhume the prophets from their pile of manure.

programme.title: Newsnight
programme.desc: Featuring extensive coverage of the days top national and international news stories, along with explanations about the context and potential aftereffects.

programme.title: BBC Weather
programme.desc: The latest weather forecast.

programme.title: Hostage
programme.desc: In 2012, photojournalists John Cantlie and James Foley chase a scoop in Syria, but their reporting draws the attention of jihadists, and the net closes in on them.

programme.title: The Last Black Man in San Francisco
Silent Witness
programme.desc: As the Bowman team continue to navigate smoke and mirrors, another victim is discovered.

programme.desc: With the new salmon-fishing season about to open on the River Tweed, Sammi Kinghorn and Matt Baker follow the final preparations before the first cast of the year.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.sub-title: Mystery Bird Monster, Ancient Alien Satellite, and Behemoth of the Sea Bottom
programme.desc: A strange creature is caught on a security camera in Youngstown, Ohio. A Proof viewer might have filmed the infamous Black Knight satellite. And the origin of a sound so loud it could be heard over the entire Equatorial Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Irish Pickers
programme.desc: The Irish Pickers are in the very west of Ireland in County Mayo, visiting an antiques and rare bookstore run by Roger Grimes in the small town of Mulranny. Ian spends more than a penny on an antique toilet bowl, and hes tempted by an ancient treasure chest possibly left behind from the time of the Spanish Armada.

programme.title: Irish Pickers
programme.desc: The boys first buying trip today is on his home turf of Dublin, where they visit some old contacts in the antiques corner of the capital and cut some great deals. Ian sells an antique clock to one of Irelands oldest pubs, the Brazen Head, where he turns over a profit of ?325 in less than a couple of hours. Ian and Butzy then journey to Waterford to a salvage yard situated on the striking coastline of the Celtic Sea.

programme.title: Dickinsons Real Deal
programme.desc: David Dickinson helps members of the public in Welwyn Garden City sort the treasures from their trash, offering them the chance to put items up for auction or accept a cash sum.

programme.title: Canadian Pickers
programme.desc: The guys scour a ghost-town theme park and an arcade warehouse for Wild West collectibles.

programme.title: Junk and Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry, Allen and Guy finally take possession of the Buick Roadmaster. After a little tinkering they cruise down to a classic car show in Newbury, but being the Junketeers cant help themselves but do a little wheeling and dealing.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: The Way of the Gam Gam
programme.desc: While in Santa Ana, Lisa channels her grandmother, in trying to turn a profit. Brandi is dealing with the most frustrating day ever. Darrell tries to make a meal out of a snack-sized locker and Kenny learns to prep himself for true stealthiness.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Lisa comes to Montebello with a clear mind, intent on letting the lockers speak to her. Ivy lets his son navigate his way to a unit which turns out not to be completely vacant. Kenny is absolutely appalled by what he finds abandoned in his unit.

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: Follow the quirky day-to day operations of American Jewelry and Loan, a family-owned and operated pawn shop in Detroit, Michigan.

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: Uproar in the pawn line reveals that an employee may be taking bribes.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Chum chases down a lead on a 1963 Fiat Microcar. Next, Jake gets a lesson from big brother Corey when a rare musical instrument enters the shop. Rick and Corey disagree on a set of billiard balls.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: King of the Swamp Troy Landry gambles on Terrals secret honey hole, while Willie gives his son the reins for the first time and Ronnie baits with rotten duck.

programme.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion
programme.desc: Pickle must face her fear of big cats as she continues to impress Troy with her natural snake hunting talent. Bill and Tes hunt stumble on a rumoured government testing facility and find all they can handle.

programme.title: Canadian Pickers
programme.desc: The guys scour a ghost-town theme park and an arcade warehouse for Wild West collectibles.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy drags Isaiah to Victorville as punishment for getting Cs on his report card. Kenny wants to furnish his new house, but there are eight reasons standing in his way. And not to be cheesy, but Lisa learns a lot.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Brandi is fired up about expanding her brand in San Bernardino. Rene is positive that everyone is out to get him. Dusty tackles a locker dustier than him. Kenny is a mess.

programme.title: Junk and Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry Cole and his partners in grime Allen Millyard and Guy Willison hit the road once again in their relentless hunt for automotive treasures - this time they visit renowned collector Francis and secure a vintage Kawasaki at the National Motorcycle Museums autumn auction. They head to a mega auto-jumble at Kempton racecourse with over two thousand pounds worth of stock.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: More than 10,000 crop circle formations have been documented in over 50 countries, and many display properties that defy conventional explanations. Maybe reconnection with our alien ancestors will only come when we finally crack the crop circle code.

programme.title: Evidence of the Unexplained
programme.desc: A man in Missouri films what looks like a metal cube spinning in the sky. Something very similar is seen in LA, Texas and Columbia.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick and Chum kick it with a rare pair of Pumas from 1968. Next, Chum is blown away by a fan from the 1940s. Later, Rick reads into a collection of letters from historical figures, but its some lab notes by Marie Curie that really leave him glowing.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: The Way of the Gam Gam

programme.title: Dickinsons Real Deal
programme.desc: David Dickinson and his antique dealers travel to Welwyn Garden City, where an unusual letter opener and some flying helmets are amongst the items brought in, also of interest is a beautiful plaque of a lady by famous maker KPN and a gentlemans vanity set.

programme.title: Curse of Skinwalker Ranch

programme.title: This is CBBC!
programme.desc: Join the CBBC crew for all your favourite programmes. Tune into CBBC every day from 7.00am.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: Bitzer gets his wish for some peace and quiet when Shaun becomes hypnotised by Mowermouth the goat and finally stops bothering him. But with the whole flock under the influence of Mowermouths powerful gaze, Bitzer soon realises just how much he needs his old buddy.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: The heroes find themselves fighting for their lives on an alien world in Quarks latest money-spinning sports event.

programme.title: Super Happy Magic Forest
programme.desc: Trevor accidentally spikes himself on a cactus while questing.

programme.title: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programme.desc: The Girls and the Boys compete to get to the top of Bear Mountain, using very different styles of camping. But when the legendary bear appears, they have to team up to survive.

programme.title: Newsround
programme.desc: News magazine keeping young viewers up to date with the latest stories and events happening at home and abroad.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings recover a jar of Yummy from an automatic distributor. However, before they can enjoy it, Grizzy confiscates the treat. In exchange, he leaves them the key ring that came as a gift.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Patricks lemonade stand is not doing too well until he gets a secret ingredient from Squidward.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: Oscar tells Olive about his early days at Odd Squad.

programme.title: Danny and Mick
programme.desc: Its holiday time for Danny and Mick, but Joy has not approved their time off, and so they are not going anywhere. However, Micks brilliant idea of bringing a caravan to work gets the boys in the holiday mood.

programme.title: Hey You What If?
programme.sub-title: You Could Fly Like a Bird?
programme.desc: Anyone can fly like a bird - you just have to travel across the solar system to do it!

programme.title: Bitesize: 7-9 Year Olds
programme.desc: Learn about where rocks come from, how fossils form and what is in soil.

programme.title: Blow Your Mind
programme.desc: Dr Chris and Dr Xand learn about gravity.

programme.title: Out of This World
programme.desc: Dr Maggie reveals spacecraft studying the sun and stars in our galaxy. Star guest is Lucie Green from the Solar Orbiter mission and she counts down the top five most powerful rockets.

programme.title: After Life: Rot Box Detectives
programme.desc: A team of young science detectives investigate rot and decay through a series of experiments and activities, assisted by Dr George McGavin.

programme.title: Operation Ouch! Hospital Takeover
programme.desc: The doctors reveal what makes us flexible as they test the strength of a tendon to the max. They find out what its like to be an air ambulance pilot in Operation Takeover and Dr Xand uncovers if laughter really is the best medicine.

programme.title: Horrible Science
programme.sub-title: Gravity the Musical, a T-rex and Vampires on Holiday
programme.desc: A totally wicked song about gravity, a T-rex going to see a doctor, vampires on holiday, and Sir Isaac Newton riding a roller coaster.

programme.title: Hey You What If?
programme.sub-title: You Could Take a Lift to Space?
programme.desc: What would happen If there really was a lift that took you all the way up to space?

programme.title: BBC Live Lessons
programme.sub-title: British Science Week 2026 - Space Live Lesson
programme.desc: Help turn the moon from Horrible Science into a movie star in an out-of-this-world BBC Live Lesson during British Science Week! Join presenter Grace Webb and the Rapping Science Teacher Matt Green as they gear up for the premiere of Moon: The Movie. Theres just one small problem. The film hasnt been made yet!

programme.title: Absolute Genius With Dick and Dom
programme.desc: Dick and Dom reveal the genius of astronomer Caroline Herschel, the first woman to spot one of the most mysterious objects in our solar system. A Comet.

programme.title: Shark Bites
programme.desc: Steve Backshall meets the great white shark, one of the greatest hunters on the planet. Steve dives with them in the open ocean, revealing clever camouflage, and heads into his shark lab to take a closer look at their terrific teeth.

programme.title: Andy And The Band
programme.sub-title: Can I Have My Ball Back?
programme.desc: Odd Sock Elliott needs to get his lost football back from next doors garden, so Andy and the Band fly into action and meet the scariest neighbour in the world!

programme.title: Gladiators: Epic Pranks
programme.desc: Nitro and Phantom prank Fire at a kids birthday party! The rest of the Gladiators have fun behind-the-scenes and pranking the audience at Sheffield Arena.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: Kwazii and the Octonauts help their friends, the coconut crabs, discover who is stealing their coconuts.

programme.title: Big Lizard
programme.desc: Dad gets a severe case of Proximan hiccups. Big Lizard and Cosima do their best to help, but their attempt to scare Dad goes wrong when a real monster turns up!

programme.title: Piripenguins
programme.sub-title: When You Wish Upon a Whale
programme.desc: Norman is missing his whale friends, so the Piris try to help but his size proves a challenge when it comes to playing games. Then a sleepover provides an unexpected breakthrough.

programme.title: Super Happy Magic Forest
programme.desc: The heroes quest to save the forest from a magical mess.

programme.title: Super Happy Magic Forest
programme.desc: Its been ages since their last quest, and the heroes are losing their edge, so Friendlyface sends them on a fake quest to get rid of a monster.

programme.title: Ninja Express
programme.desc: In preparation for his mothers visit, an orc summons the Ninjas to find an orc cleaner to make his house dirty again after two fairies cleaned up his mess.

programme.title: The Next Step

programme.title: Malory Towers
programme.desc: Clarissa faces up to her brother at lacrosse while Mr Parker worries about Nancy in goal.

programme.desc: The potato racers drive each other round the bend, the DIY doughnuts attempt to fix the bathroom, the cavemen mushrooms come face to face with some big, hairy, mammoth pots, fearless Pete Parsnip takes on a ferocious foe and Slippery Nana takes on a pizza-cutting unicycle in the talent show.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: When the Farmer gets stuck in the loo, Bitzer has to get vital supplies to him as a matter of urgency. His initial efforts end in failure and he drafts in Shaun and the gang to help out.

programme.title: Super Happy Magic Forest

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: Tish and her friends have just been given homework that requires them to paint themselves in the future. All of Tishs friends seem certain on their future jobs but Tish is not sure at all.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: When Bing wants to get dizzy on the roundabout, Pando pushes him very fast. Bing quickly learns that a little dizzy is fun, but too much dizzy is no fun at all.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubby Car takes the Teletubbies to the Hidey Hup where they discover the Tubby Slidey. Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po have great fun sliding down again and again.

programme.title: Tee and Mo
programme.desc: With a little help from Mo, Tee decides to set up his own shop and sell his old and broken toys.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.sub-title: The Good, the Bad and the Prickly
programme.desc: Prickly Pear arrives in the supermarket and tries to take over Evil Peas freezer. Supertato discovers that Prickly Pear isnt mean at all and just needs some good friends.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Bing and Nicky are sleeping over at Sulas house, but Bing has forgotten Hoppity. The wind causes a branch to make a scratchy noise that terrifies Bing, who isnt very comforted by Sulas fairy rhino. Amma phones Flop, while Sula, Nicky and Bing play Nicky tickles as they wait. Flop arrives, bringing his sleeping bag and Hoppity so they can all sleep over.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Fabios yummy new sauce is so sticky that he gets stuck to Mojos bonnet. They have to do everything together until Bo figures out how to unsticky that sauce!

programme.title: Hey Duggees Squirrel Club
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee has made a time machine to show the Squirrels famous periods in time.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Dad thinks the kids have too many toys and suggests a chuck out. To save their beloved Mr Monkeyjocks from getting the chop, Bluey and Bingo must prove he is special.

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are exploring Cheddar Gorge and enjoying its rocky slopes. But Glitch, learning about the towns love of cheese, pays a visit to the gorge in order to share his fondue with the locals. This backfires horribly when he accidentally floods the gorge with the cheesy mixture. Its up to the Go Jetters to rescue the tourists, the sheep and the Grimbots - but will Foz be able to overcome his fear of heights and save a lost lamb?

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Treehouse Rescue
programme.desc: When Peter is forced to reveal the location of the secret treehouse to Flopsy and Mopsy, the girls decide to hang out in Peters den - just as Old Brown launches a tree-top attack!

programme.title: Octonauts: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: The Octonauts expand their exploration beyond the sea - and onto land. With new rides and new friends, they are prepared to protect any habitats and animals at risk on land or under the water.

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: Ones friends have broken toys that need to be fixed, can she help them all?

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: From A to Z, every Alphablock has fun discovering the magic of wordplay. P, A, R and Y plan a surprise for T, but first they must get out of a trap.

programme.title: Love Monster
programme.desc: Love Monsters pineapple costume makes it difficult for him to participate in any of the party events.

programme.title: Playtime Towers
programme.desc: Bella and Lift are visited by a shining star and set off to explore the floors of Playtime Towers. The first stop is Sketch in Boxtropolis - what will she be making today?

programme.title: Roots and Fruits
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits Theatre, its Banana revealing an astonishing secret about herself in the opera piece, Ive Got a Secret.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: At Ammas creche the children make eggy heads with egg shells and cress seeds. Bing knows his Eggy needs water, light and time before it can grow hair but waiting is hard. He tries to speed up the process by giving Eggy lots of water with the garden hose.

programme.title: Yakka Dee
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say `shorts, and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see all sorts of shorts, red shorts, stripy shorts, kick-it-really-far shorts and flamingo shorts.

programme.title: Lu and the Bally Bunch
programme.desc: When Lu is upset after Declan takes a bite from her fruit, Declan, who recently learnt that sharing is caring, feels he hasnt done anything wrong. Shella tries to help Lu and Declan understand each others point of view.

programme.title: Piggy Builders
programme.desc: The Piggies rebuild a big wheel, but the instructions are missing. While Cesar searches, Charlie and Cornelia start building anyway. What could go wrong?

programme.title: Twirlywoos
programme.desc: The Twirlywoos watch a waiter set a wedding table in a marquee. The waiter places plates and cutlery next to each other. The Twirlywoos help by getting items from outside and placing them next to the plates. The bride and groom enter and are amazed.

programme.title: Something Special
programme.desc: Justin and his friends visit a theme park and ride on a rollercoaster. Meanwhile, Mr Tumble and the Tumble Toys are very tired and need to sleep - except for the puppy!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: After a fun waving game with the Tiddlytubbies, the Teletubbies enjoy watching children waving as they set off on a short boat trip. Finally, the Teletubbies wave to the Tiddlytubbies, who are off to sleepybyes.

programme.title: The Baby Club
programme.desc: Nigel and Baby Bear welcome babies Francis, Minnie, Theo, Alana, Reau and their grown-ups to The Baby Club. Nigels got some toy binoculars inside his bag. All the parents and little ones have different park-themed toys and objects too.

programme.title: I Spy, You Spy
programme.desc: Elsee joins her friend Fiadh at a local cafe for a game of I Spy.

programme.title: I Can Grow It
programme.desc: Today, Aaron, Isla and Abbie embark on an exciting spring adventure around the garden, discovering the abundance of colours popping up in their inner-city oasis. But why does the garden become more colourful during spring? Our very own gardening guru, Chatterpot, provides the clues to their horticultural questions.

programme.title: Dylans Playtime Adventures
programme.desc: Dylan imagines hes a gardener and wants to make something grow! However, growing takes time, so he and his friends need to get creative.

programme.title: Small Potatoes
programme.desc: Animated series about a group of potatoes who sing songs in different genres. In this blues song, the Potatoes enter famous paintings and sculptures, celebrating different ways art is created.

programme.title: Vegesaurs
programme.desc: During a game of I Spy, Ginger spots something that none of the Peas can see.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo and Mum get into a debate with Dad about the definition of teasing. As they recall all the times hes been a big teaser, Dad argues that he was only playing.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels practice their golf swing in some interesting conditions in pursuit of their Crazy Golf Badges and the ultimate prize, a round of milkshakes.

programme.title: The Game Catchers
programme.desc: The Cosmo-players arrive on an underwater planet and start hunting for clues, until the are interrupted by a turtle that cannot find its way home.

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Mittens is playing Mummies, and wants Timmy to be the baby in her make-shift pram. At first reluctant, Timmy soon finds out that being a baby can be fun especially when everyone spoils you rotten! When he finds that babies dont play football, his enthusiasm starts to wane.

programme.title: Our Family
programme.sub-title: Iona and Elbas Mission to Mars
programme.desc: Iona and Elba make bird feeders as a present for their Nanny Pip and Gramps, who they are visiting. They place the feeders around the garden and wait patiently for birds to arrive, hoping theyll discover the tasty treats.

programme.title: My World Kitchen
programme.desc: Zahra-Roses family is from Somalia, a country situated on the east coast of Africa. In Somalia, they have the traditional dish of nafaqo, which is boiled egg wrapped in mashed potato. This is what Zahra-Rose has chosen to make for her friends.

programme.title: Ferne and Rorys Teeny Tiny Creatures
programme.desc: Bella finds out all about some of the smallest mammals in the UK - mice! Chantelle visits a wildlife group to meet Sean, Mossy, Gabriela and Cara and help them release harvest mice into the wild.

programme.title: Dog Squad
programme.desc: When guide dog Kika has a waggy tail-related accident with a purple smoothie, she and her owner Dr Amit visit the Woofton Library of Things to borrow a carpet cleaner.

programme.title: Go Wild
programme.sub-title: Aneeshwar and Lizzie: Python and Pelican
programme.desc: Aneeshwar and Lizzie meet a reticulated python and pelicans.

programme.title: Waffle the Wonder Dog
programme.desc: Waffle, Simon, Doug, Evie and Ruby do a sponsored silence to raise money for the school. Its not much fun, so Mrs Hobbs suggests they do a jigsaw. Waffle finds the missing piece.

programme.title: Puffin Rock
programme.desc: Oona turns bird detective and learns all about seagull behaviour.

programme.title: Yukee
programme.desc: Yukees garden friends help turn her a day in my life homework assignment into an exciting, musical sound adventure.

programme.title: My Petsaurus
programme.desc: Its a chilly winters day and Chloe and her Mum are walking Topsy in the park. The poor weather means they want to head home early. However, Topsy decides he would rather stay and play longer.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Its a hot day so Duggee is treating the Squirrels to a trip to the tropical lake. Its particularly busy out today and theres a traffic jam! Thank goodness Duggee has his traffic badge. He knows what to do!

programme.title: Yakka Dee
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say peas and go on a whirlwind word adventure. See peas on a plate, peas in a pod and even a pea flying! Peas can be little, yummy and frozen.

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: Its time for Table Spinners, a game show hosted by Numberblock One. Todays contestant is none other than the Six Times Table. Her task is to try and identify the order of a special team - the Rolling Sixes. They include Six, Twelve, Eighteen, Twenty-Four, Thirty, Thirty-Six, Forty-Two, Forty-Eight, Fifty-Four and Sixty. The Six Times Table will get to see the team for a brief moment before the doors slide shut on the table spinner.

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: Its pandemonium at the Alphablocks animal sing-song. S has a special surprise in store. This episode has fun with the words cat, dog, cod, tag, jog, jig, mop, moo, moon, spoon and zoom.

programme.title: Something Special: Were All Friends
programme.desc: Justin and his friend pretend to be superheroes for the day. Meanwhile, Super Tumble goes to the rescue of Shopkeeper Tumble, Baker Tumble and Aunt Polly.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies ride the Dup Dup and the Tubby Custard Machine. In Tummy Tales, a boy takes a ride on a cable car.

programme.title: Patchwork Pals
programme.desc: Patchwork Flamingo has a problem: hes all twisted. Can the Patchwork Pals find a way to help him?

programme.title: Raa Raa the Noisy Lion
programme.sub-title: Raa Raa and the Ladybird Den
programme.desc: Crocky doesnt know where his collection of sticks has gone, until Pia realises Raa Raa took them by mistake.

programme.title: Chuggington
programme.desc: Following the adventures of trainee engines Koko, Wilson, and Brewster, as they learn important lessons like cooperation, perseverance and respect.

programme.title: Graces Amazing Machines
programme.desc: Grace shows off three amazing machines that work in docks!

programme.title: Octonauts

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Downhill Escape

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Norrie suggests a dressing up party to celebrate Enids birthday.

programme.desc: Supertato has to keep Raisins most precious button safe from Evil Pea.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

Doug tells Waffle that Gramps will be walking him today, hell be coming to the house later. Waffle is insistent, he wants to walk to school with the rest of the family.

programme.sub-title: Specials: Its Time to Go to the Airport
programme.desc: JoJo, Gran Gran, Mummy and Daddy are at the airport waiting to take a flight to see a special someone, Great-Gran Gran in Saint Lucia. Theyre all ready to go when their flight gets delayed. To pass the time, Daddy teaches JoJo where Saint Lucia is on the world map. Gran Gran shows JoJo planes going to different destinations, and Mummy gets a gift for Great-Gran Gran. Eventually, the gate to their flight opens, and once aboard the plane, its up, up and away they go.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: After Homer fails a breathalyser test driving home from a visit to the Duff brewery, he is forced to quit drinking for a month. Meanwhile, Lisa buys a hamster for her school science project, in order to prove that Bart is dumber than a rodent.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Valentines Day comes to Springfield and Lisa takes pity on Ralph and gives him a card, but when Ralph falls in love with Lisa their friendship turns bad, causing a bitter feud to break out between the two families.

programme.title: Jamie: What to Eat This Week
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver takes us on a delicious journey, as he reawakens the kitchen garden after winter. He celebrates rhubarb in a lip-smacking sauce for marinated pork belly, and picks some new season spinach for a silky goats cheese risotto.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil return for a new series, and in London its double trouble for Kirstie as she helps 67 identical twins Matt and Chris Wickham, who are clubbing together to buy their first home. Phil helps Sam Taylor and his fiancee Krystle Maher, who are desperate to move out of their small rented flat in Deptford and into a home of their own.

programme.title: Japans Tsunami: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Featuring previously unseen footage, the programme gives accounts from eyewitnesses, amateur photographers and video enthusiasts who caught the events of Japans cataclysmic tsunami on camera. It also grapples with the aftermath: the loss, uncertainty and long-term trauma faced by individuals and towns struggling to come to terms with whether they can or should rebuild their shattered communities.

programme.desc: On the Norfolk Broads, holidaymaker Caroline needs the help of East Anglian Air Ambulance after a boating accident. Thames Valley Air Ambulance attend a large collision on the A40.

programme.title: The China Connection

programme.title: Kal Ho Naa Ho
programme.desc: Student Naina is good friends with her classmate, skirt-chaser Rohit. Her home life is rife with family tensions as her widowed mums restaurant runs into difficulties. When charismatic Aman moves into the neighbourhood, he changes everyones lives, bringing a breath of fresh air, and although he loses his heart to Naina, Aman has a secret that prevents him from marrying her.

programme.title: Fida
programme.desc: One day Jai meets the girl of his dreams - literally. He spots Neha, the spitting image of a vision he once saw of the girl he was to fall in love with. Unfortunately, even though she also falls for him, the story does not go well.

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Bringing the best in television.

programme.title: Sergeant
programme.desc: A diligent police officer who loses his leg during a dangerous mission risks his life to solve a critical unresolved murder case.

programme.title: Bemisal
programme.desc: The story of a deprived boy, who is brought up in a privileged family and indebted for virtually everything he has.

programme.title: Chor Ke Ghar Chor
programme.desc: When an idol of Devi Maa, which brings immense luck to its owner, is found after many years, it causes a lot of mayhem between two noble families that wish to keep it for themselves.

programme.title: Chote Sarkar
programme.desc: Amar, a businessman, is framed by two undercover police officers, Seema and Jagmohan, for the murder of his uncle. He then pretends to be mentally unstable. How will the drama unfold?

programme.title: Beta
programme.desc: After the death of his mother, Rajus father re-marries, but his stepmother is only after the familys money. When Raju eventually marries, his wife tries to make him realise what kind of woman his stepmother is.

programme.title: Gupt
programme.desc: The day after a heated argument between Sahil and his father, the father is found dead, and Sahil given a life sentence, but he manages to break out of prison and sets out to find his fathers true murderer.

programme.title: Agneepath
programme.desc: A young boys father is lynched before his eyes. Fifteen years later he returns home for revenge.
