programme.title: Safe House
programme.desc: Six government agents become trapped inside a high-security safe house after a terrorist attack in downtown Los Angeles. They soon realise they must survive not just the enemy outside, but the potential traitor among them.

programme.title: Long Gone Heroes
programme.desc: Gunner is a special forces soldier who returns to the field of battle to save his kidnapped niece in South America. He and his team soon discover that her disappearance is part of a corrupt private operation that hits way too close to home.

programme.title: The Good, the Bad and the Ugly
programme.desc: The Good is Blondie, a wandering gunman with a strong personal sense of honour; the Bad is Angel Eyes, a sadistic hit man who always hits his mark; and the Ugly is Tuco, a Mexican bandit whos always only looking out for himself. Against the backdrop of the Civil War, they search for a fortune in gold buried in a graveyard. Each knows only a portion of the golds exact location, so they must work together.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Adventure sequel. Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones, on the trail of fortune and glory in Old Shanghai, is ricocheted into a dangerous adventure in India. With his faithful companion Short Round and nightclub singer Willie Scott, Indie goes in search of the magical Sankara stone, and uncovers an ancient evil which threatens all who come into contact with it.

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: To clear his criminal record a former LA cop must infiltrate the Miami street-racing scene to set up a drug baron. Burning rubber all over the city with his ex-con friend, he attempts to deliver the crook to the FBI without crashing and being blown to pieces in one of the many explosions.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: Journalist Eddie Brock is trying to take down Carlton Drake, the notorious and brilliant founder of the Life Foundation. While investigating one of Drakes experiments, Eddies body merges with the alien Venom -- leaving him with superhuman strength and power. Twisted, dark and fueled by rage, Venom tries to control the new and dangerous abilities that Eddie finds so intoxicating.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
programme.desc: Peter Parker finds a clue that might help him understand why his parents disappeared when he was young. His path puts him on a collision course with Dr. Curt Connors, his fathers former partner.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: The emergence of a powerful new villain and the return of an old friend bring Peter Parker to the realization that all his enemies have one thing in common: Oscorp. Based on Marvel Comics characters.

programme.title: Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga
programme.desc: Snatched from the Green Place of Many Mothers, young Furiosa gets caught in the crossfire of two tyrannical warlords. As the tyrants fight for dominance, Furiosa soon finds herself in a nonstop battle to make her way home.

programme.title: Bad Boys: Ride or Die
programme.desc: When their late police captain gets linked to drug cartels, wisecracking Miami cops Mike Lowrey and Marcus Burnett embark on a dangerous mission to clear his name.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: The intrepid explorer Indiana Jones sets out to rescue his father, a medievalist who has vanished while searching for the Holy Grail. Following clues in the old mans notebook, Indy arrives in Venice, where he enlists the help of a beautiful academic, but they are not the only ones who are on the trail, and some sinister old enemies soon come out of the woodwork.

programme.title: The Patriot
programme.desc: A widowed farmer, with a brave but brutal military past, decides not to join up when the British arrive in 1776. However, when his son enlists and is later captured by the enemy, the former soldier must abandon his new-found pacifist principles in order to rescue his oldest child, and forms a regiment of Carolina patriots, whose guerrilla tactics prove pivotal to the US war effort.

programme.title: The Patriot
programme.desc: A widowed farmer, with a brave but brutal military past, decides not to join up when the British arrive in 1776. However, when his son enlists and is later captured by the enemy, the former soldier must abandon his new-found pacifist principles in order to rescue his oldest child, and forms a regiment of Carolina patriots, whose guerrilla tactics prove pivotal to the US war effort.

programme.title: Fireheart
programme.desc: In New York City in 1932, women are not allowed to be firefighters. When the citys firemen disappear in mysterious fires, Georgia Nolan sees a golden opportunity. She disguises herself as Joe and joins a team of improvised firemen.

programme.title: Open Season
programme.desc: Stranded in the wilderness, a mule deer and a domesticated bear try to make their way back to the safety of a town preserve before a hunter catches them.

programme.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
programme.desc: Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, leads a fierce team of secret ninja warriors to defeat the evil warlord Garmadon and save Ninjago City.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: The sequel to `Madagascar, in which New York Zoo animals, Alex the Lion, Marty the Zebra, Melman the Giraffe and Gloria the Hippo, still stranded on Madagascar, start to leave the island. All of a sudden, they land in the wilderness of Africa, where Alex meets the rest of his family, but has trouble communicating with them after spending so much time at the Central Park Zoo.

programme.title: Dog Man
programme.desc: A life-saving surgery fuses together a police officer and his faithful police dog -- and Dog Man is born. Learning to embrace his new identity, Dog Man must stop feline supervillain Petey the Cat from cloning himself and going on a crime spree.

programme.title: Pets on a Train
programme.desc: When a crew of animal bandits embark on a routine swindle, they find themselves caught up in a train heist. Its up to Falcon, a petty thief raccoon, and Rex, a righteous police-dog, to save the animals on this high-speed runway train.

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: A snail gets the chance to escape his slow-paced life and race in the Indianapolis 500 when a freak accident gives him the power of superspeed.

programme.title: Open Season
programme.desc: Stranded in the wilderness, a mule deer and a domesticated bear try to make their way back to the safety of a town preserve before a hunter catches them.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr., whos intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison and vows revenge against Gru.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Concerned that his half-human grandson isnt showing his vampire side, Dracula and his friends put the boy through a `monster-in-training boot camp just as Dracs old-school father decides to pay a visit.

programme.title: Pets on a Train
programme.desc: When a crew of animal bandits embark on a routine swindle, they find themselves caught up in a train heist. Its up to Falcon, a petty thief raccoon, and Rex, a righteous police-dog, to save the animals on this high-speed runway train.

programme.title: The Emoji Movie
programme.desc: Three emojis embark on an epic adventure through a smartphone to save their world from being deleted.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: Inventor Flint Lockwood dreams of discovering an idea that will change peoples lives forever, and after several misguided attempts he may just have done it. Flint has invented a machine that can turn water into delicious food, and, when his first demonstration accidentally sends the machine shooting into the clouds, cheeseburgers begin raining down from the sky.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs 2
programme.desc: Discovering that his most-famous machine is now creating animal/vegetable hybrids, inventor Flint Lockwood and his friends venture forth to save the world from tacodiles, shrimpanzees and other creatures.

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village
programme.desc: With the evil wizard Gargamel hot on their trail, Smurfette, Brainy, Clumsy and Hefty embark on a journey through the Forbidden Forest to find a mysterious village.

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village
programme.desc: With the evil wizard Gargamel hot on their trail, Smurfette, Brainy, Clumsy and Hefty embark on a journey through the Forbidden Forest to find a mysterious village.

programme.title: In and Out
programme.desc: The entire town is watching with bated breath as one of their own is up for an Oscar. They get more than they bargain for when he outs his high-school English teacher, who then has to prove to everyone, especially his fiancee, that hes straight. The press turn up and one reporter in particular is making life very difficult.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: After 15 years in African bush country, Cady knows all about herd instincts, but nothing has prepared her for high school. She joins a popular but cruelly manipulative crowd of girls known as the `Plastics and secretly mocks them, but the fun stops when one betrays her and steals the boy she fancies.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Video Games
programme.desc: From pixelated beginnings to the big screen, we bring you your favourite games that made it to the movies - from `Sonic the Hedgehog 3 to `Street Fighter and more.

programme.title: Tootsie
programme.desc: An out-of-work actor dresses in drag for an audition, only to land the female lead in a TV soap. When he becomes the most popular character on the show, he feels compelled to carry the persona into his everyday life. While bringing him phenomenal success as an `actress, life as a woman also has its problems - especially when he falls for an actress with whom he works.

programme.title: The Natural
programme.desc: The almost mythical ability of a middle-aged baseball player rockets a major-league team toward the 1939 pennant.

programme.title: Am I OK?
programme.desc: When Lucy realises that shes never been attracted to men, her lifelong friend Jane helps her navigate coming out in her 30s.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: A crazy Las Vegas bachelor party turns into a race against time when three hung-over groomsmen awaken after a night of drunken debauchery to find that the groom has gone missing, and attempt to get him to the alter in time for his wedding.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A group of friends go to Thailand for a quiet and restrained stag party, but are dismayed to wake up in a mysterious hotel room, with a man missing and no memory of the night before. Of course, Alan manages to get himself in with the crowd.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.title: The Golden Child
programme.desc: A social worker who specialises in missing children is recruited to rescue a mystical Tibetan child from evil forces.

programme.title: Shirley Valentine
programme.desc: Shirley is a Liverpudlian housewife stuck in a loveless marriage. One day she finds herself talking to the wall, and decides to make some changes in her life. Flying off to the Greek island of Mykonos on her own, she is gently romanced by middle-aged waiter Costas.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: Set on a Greek island, a young woman who is about to be married suspects that any one of three men could be her father. She invites them all to her wedding without telling her mother. Movie adaptation of the musical, set to Abbas greatest hits.

programme.title: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
programme.desc: In 1979 Donna falls in love with Sam while embarking on a series of adventures throughout Europe. In the present day, Donnas pregnant daughter reunites with her mothers old friends and boyfriends on the Greek island of Kalokairi.

programme.title: Daddys Home 2
programme.desc: Brad and Dustys respective fathers show up to turn Christmastime upside down.

programme.title: Jackass: The Movie
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville and his mad companions leap onto the big screen. Expect the usual mad gross-out japes, from making snow cones out of urine to using the display toilets in bathroom outlets, and from racing golf carts over hallowed greens to tightrope walking over alligators.

programme.title: Jackass: The Movie
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville and his mad companions leap onto the big screen. Expect the usual mad gross-out japes, from making snow cones out of urine to using the display toilets in bathroom outlets, and from racing golf carts over hallowed greens to tightrope walking over alligators.

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: Escaping postwar Europe, a visionary architect comes to America to rebuild his life, his career, and his marriage. On his own in a strange new country, he settles in Pennsylvania, where a wealthy and prominent industrialist recognises his talent.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Risky Romance
programme.desc: From killers and zombies to forbidden love and dangerous desires, `The Cinema List explores romances where passion courts danger and love is always worth the risk.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A sports agent who makes the mistake of saying what he believes, finds himself sacked and abandoned by all his clients apart from small time footballer Rod Tidwell. Maguires personal life starts to fall apart as hes torn between love and money in Cameron Crowes metaphor on Americans need for success and money.

programme.title: Elizabeth: The Golden Age
programme.desc: Elizabeth might have her royal rival Mary Queen of Scots in custody, but a far greater threat lies to the east: the Spanish Armada. Despite her reign of 30 years, Elizabeths hold on the English throne remains uncertain. Her kingdom lies in the shadow of mighty Spain, Philip IIs vast army and the Inquisition, but Elizabeth is undaunted.

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: At a tough training school for American navy pilots, one of the new intake falls foul of the hard-as-nails drill sergeant, but takes it on the chin, and finds the additional strength to help a fellow student who is feeling the pressure.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: A Secret Service agent-turned-bodyguard finds danger and romance while protecting an entertainer from a stalker.

programme.title: Boy Meets Boy
programme.desc: Harry has been partying for 48 hours when he meets Johannes on the dance floor of a club in Berlin. With 15 hours until his flight home, Johannes offers to help him print his boarding pass.

programme.title: Lost in Translation
programme.desc: In Tokyo shooting a whisky commercial, middle-aged actor Bob Harris becomes attracted to Charlotte, the young wife of a celebrity photographer. Together they ride out their boredom of hotel life and their bewilderment of the city.

programme.title: Dunkirk
programme.desc: Germany advances into France, trapping Allied troops on the beaches of Dunkirk. Under air and ground cover from British and French forces, troops are slowly and methodically evacuated from the beach using every vessel that can be found.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A sports agent who makes the mistake of saying what he believes, finds himself sacked and abandoned by all his clients apart from small time footballer Rod Tidwell. Maguires personal life starts to fall apart as hes torn between love and money in Cameron Crowes metaphor on Americans need for success and money.

programme.title: Jackie
programme.desc: The days leading up to the tragedy of President John F. Kennedys assassination and its immediate aftermath are chronicled as they were experienced by the First Lady, wife of the charismatic president and mother of two small children.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Hard-drinking country music star Jackson Maine discovers, and falls in love with, a struggling but talented singer named Ally. As her career quickly takes off, Jackson starts to realize that his best days may be behind him.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment
programme.desc: While widow Aurora fends off a stream of admirers, daughter Emma learns the hard facts of married life.

programme.title: Joker: Folie à Deux
programme.desc: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck stumbles upon true love while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Awaiting trial for the murder of five people, Fleck soon discovers the music thats always been inside him.

programme.title: Joker: Folie à Deux
programme.desc: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck stumbles upon true love while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Awaiting trial for the murder of five people, Fleck soon discovers the music thats always been inside him.

programme.title: Twist
programme.desc: A thrilling modern day take on Charles Dickens novel, `Oliver Twist, as a gang of street hustlers plan the heist of the century.

programme.title: The Portable Door
programme.desc: A man lands an internship at a mysterious London firm with unconventional employees, including the charismatic CEO who is incorporating modern corporate strategy into ancient magical practices.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: The turtles spring into action to battle Shredder, mad scientist Baxter Stockman, Bebop, Rocksteady and the notorious Krang.

programme.title: Save The Cinema
programme.desc: Sky Original film following Welsh hairdresser Liz Evans fight to save her small towns theatre. Poignant British drama based on a true story starring Samantha Morton.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo 2: Monsters Unleashed
programme.desc: The crime-busting gang, Mystery Inc, and their dopey mutt Scooby-Doo are back, this time investigating the spooky goings-on brought about by an evil genius intent on wreaking havoc in the town of Coolsville.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
programme.desc: Paul Blart desperately wants to become a cop, but he is too fat to pass the physical exam. He instead works as a security guard in a shopping mall. One day criminals put the mall under siege, and Blart takes it upon himself to save the day.

programme.title: Stuart Little
programme.desc: A New York couple go to an orphanage to adopt a brother for their only son, but instead come away with a little mouse. On arrival at his new home, the diminutive rodent receives a lukewarm welcome by the boy - and an even frostier reception from the pet cat. Featuring a mixture of live action and animation.

programme.title: Blithe Spirit
programme.desc: A spiritualist medium holds a seance for a writer suffering from writers block but accidentally summons the spirit of his deceased first wife which leads to an increasingly complex love triangle with his current wife of five years.

programme.title: Look Whos Talking
programme.desc: Mollie is a pregnant woman whose partner has deserted her. When she goes into labour, friendly taxi driver James rushes her to hospital and the pair become firm friends. He slowly falls in love with her and her baby Mikey, but shes still looking for her perfect partner, not realising hes right under her nose. However we can hear Mikeys thoughts, and he wants James as his Dad.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Four unlikely warriors rise from the sewers and join forces with fearless reporter April ONeil to save New York from Shredder and his evil minions.

programme.title: Save The Cinema
programme.desc: Sky Original film following Welsh hairdresser Liz Evans fight to save her small towns theatre. Poignant British drama based on a true story starring Samantha Morton.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: A high school senior befriends a strange subterranean creature after building a monster truck from bits and pieces of scrapped cars.

programme.title: Spy Kids 3: Game Over
programme.desc: The Spy Kids set off on their third adventure. Secret Agent Carmen finds herself trapped in a 3-D virtual reality video game designed by their new arch nemesis, the Toymaker. Juni must save his sister, as they battle it out against lifelike 3-D monsters, completing each progressively harder level and ultimately trying to save the youth of the world.

programme.title: Spy Kids 3: Game Over

Juni must save his sister, as they battle it out against lifelike 3-D monsters, completing each progressively harder level and ultimately trying to save the youth of the world.

programme.title: Shirley Valentine
programme.desc: Shirley is a Liverpudlian housewife stuck in a loveless marriage. One day she finds herself talking to the wall, and decides to make some changes in her life. Flying off to the Greek island of Mykonos on her own, she is gently romanced by middle-aged waiter Costas.

programme.title: Sixteen Candles
programme.desc: A teen suffers the pain of adolescence as she longs for Mr. Right while fending off the advances of the class clown.

programme.title: Tootsie
programme.desc: An out-of-work actor dresses in drag for an audition, only to land the female lead in a TV soap. When he becomes the most popular character on the show, he feels compelled to carry the persona into his everyday life. While bringing him phenomenal success as an `actress, life as a woman also has its problems - especially when he falls for an actress with whom he works.

programme.title: Billy Madison
programme.desc: Billy is the son of hotel chain magnate Brian Madison and expects to inherit the family fortune, but hes shocked when his father stipulates he wont unless he passes 12th grade in just 24 weeks. It will be tough, since he never passed 1st grade. Determined to prove his father wrong, Billy enrols at school.

programme.title: See No Evil, Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Lighthearted adventures of a pair of news vendors in New York - one deaf, one blind - who go on the run when they are blamed for the murder of a customer. Each has seen - or heard - just a whiff of a clue, and a frantic chase ensues as the duo struggle to clear their names.

programme.title: Police Academy
programme.desc: Misfits realise their dreams of becoming cops when a mayoral decree forces the police academy to open its doors to all.

programme.title: Police Academy 2: Their First Assignment
programme.desc: Mahoney and friends have graduated from the Police Academy and are issued with their first assignments. As before, their cheerfulness and devotion to duty outweighs any shortcomings, but are they ready to do battle with a band of graffiti daubing terrorists?

programme.title: Police Academy 3: Back in Training
programme.desc: Slapstick farce with the incompetent cops as they set about saving their beloved academy from closure. Cutbacks mean that only one of the two police training schools can stay open, so Commandant Lassard appeals to the motley crew of graduates to come and train new recruits. However, the rival academy intends to sabotage their plans by cutting their training time down to a minimum.

programme.title: See No Evil, Hear No Evil

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Two wisecracking Miami cops are forced to swap identities in order to track down $100 million of heroin stolen from the police. Their only lead is a young woman who can identify the culprits, but when they track her down, she mistakes one of the cops for his partner, forcing the pair into a bizarre and chaotic life swap.

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: In an attempt to avenge the violent death of his parents, Bruce Wayne fights to rid the city of crime and in particular, his nemesis the Joker. However, his defences come down when an attractive journalist tries to track down the truth behind sightings of a huge bat-like figure in the sky.

programme.title: Batman Returns
programme.desc: After Selina Kyle sees more than she should in her bosss office, she has an `accident, falling from the top floor of the building to the street below. Awoken by the licking of cats, she is surprised to find herself still very much alive. She vows to take revenge on her boss and becomes a female avenger, defending women under attack and providing assistance to Batmans efforts to keep the streets of Gotham safe.

programme.title: Men in Black
programme.desc: The secretive Men in Black are agents charged with regulating the aliens who have settled on Earth and ensure that they remain undetected. New recruit J and his partner K must find and stop an intergalactic terrorist bent on assassinating two ambassadors from opposing galaxies before they can make peace.

programme.title: Jackie
programme.desc: The days leading up to the tragedy of President John F. Kennedys assassination and its immediate aftermath are chronicled as they were experienced by the First Lady, wife of the charismatic president and mother of two small children.

programme.title: Chuck Chuck Baby
programme.desc: Helen lives with her ex-husband, his 20-year-old girlfriend, their new baby and his dying mother. Her dreary life is interrupted when her schoolgirl crush arrives back in town.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: Primatologist Davis Okoye shares an unshakable bond with George, an extraordinarily intelligent silverback gorilla thats been in his care since birth. When a genetic experiment goes wrong, it causes George, a wolf and a reptile to grow to a monstrous size. As the mutated beasts embark on a path of destruction, Okoye teams up with a discredited genetic engineer and the military to secure an antidote and prevent a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Street Fighter
programme.desc: The cynical commander of Allied Nations forces has to prevent a warlord from taking over the world. With 63 hostages held in his seemingly impregnable fortress, the warlord is demanding an outrageously hefty ransom.

programme.title: Long Gone Heroes
programme.desc: Gunner is a special forces soldier who returns to the field of battle to save his kidnapped niece in South America. He and his team soon discover that her disappearance is part of a corrupt private operation that hits way too close to home.

programme.title: Hero
programme.desc: To the court of the King of Qin, who seeks to rule the united country, comes Nameless, who claims to have killed three deadly assassins who were all determined to kill the King. As Nameless recounts his exploits in flashback, each time the wily King responds with his version. Is Nameless a true servant of Qin or does he have a secret agenda?

programme.title: Fast and Furious Presents: Hobbs and Shaw
programme.desc: Brixton Lorr is a cybernetically enhanced soldier who possesses superhuman strength, a brilliant mind and a lethal pathogen that could wipe out half of the worlds population. Its now up to hulking lawman Luke Hobbs and lawless operative Deckard Shaw to put aside their past differences and work together to prevent the seemingly indestructible Lorr from destroying humanity.

programme.title: xXx: The Return of Xander Cage
programme.desc: After coming out of self-imposed exile, daredevil operative Xander Cage must race against time to recover a sinister weapon known as Pandoras Box, a device that controls every military satellite in the world. Recruiting a new group of thrill-seeking cohorts, Xander finds himself entangled in a deadly conspiracy that points to collusion at the highest levels of government.

programme.title: I Am Legend
programme.desc: In the year 2012, scientists engineer a cure for cancer. Three years later, every human in New York is dead or mutated into a light-sensitive zombie by the virus that was supposed to heal. Only one man survives, virologist Robert Neville. He has two aims: find a cure for the virus and make contact with other survivors.

programme.title: Bad Boys II
programme.desc: Loose-cannon cops Lowrey and Burnett reduce Miami to rubble as they try to stop Cuban and Russian drug smugglers from flooding Florida with ecstasy.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: Big-budget tale of the battle for survival in a world where dry land has disappeared with the melting of the polar ice caps. One man, who has become amphibious, tries to protect survivors on an artificial atoll made from scrap metal by taking on a gang of marauding pirates. He is also intent on discovering if there is any truth in the myth that there is still some land left above water.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Thriller set at the Stanley Cup ice hockey finals. Its Game 7 and the winner will lift the trophy but with the Vice President attending, criminal Joshua Foss has his eyes on a bigger prize. Holding the VP hostage, his demands are backed up by the shooting of selected hostages and the threat of bombs planted around the stadium. However, rink security guard McCord, whose kids are in the crowd, refuses to be cowed.

programme.title: I, Tonya
programme.desc: In 1991, talented figure skater Tonya Harding becomes the first American woman to complete a triple axel during a competition. In 1994, her world comes crashing down when her ex-husband conspires to injure Nancy Kerrigan, a fellow Olympic hopeful, in a poorly conceived attack that forces the young woman to withdraw from the national championship. Hardings life and legacy instantly become tarnished as shes forever associated with one of the most infamous scandals in sports history.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: Set on a Greek island, a young woman who is about to be married suspects that any one of three men could be her father. She invites them all to her wedding without telling her mother. Movie adaptation of the musical, set to Abbas greatest hits.

programme.title: The Blind Side
programme.desc: Michael Oher is a poor and undereducated African-American teenager who lived all his life on the streets. His tremendous size and quickness makes him a perfect athlete and attracts the interest if a wealthy and conservative suburban family who take him in and groom him both athletically and academically.

programme.title: Wicked
programme.desc: An unlikely friendship emerges between Elphaba and Glinda, two clashing witches in the magical land of Oz. Elphaba is wrongfully cast as a wicked witch as she seeks to expose the fraudulent, corrupt Wizard who rules the land.

programme.title: Love Actually
programme.desc: Weaving in and out of the love lives of eight loosely inter-related couples. The bachelor Prime Minister falls for his personal assistant, his brother-in-law is flirting with one of his colleagues, a writer heads off to France and pursues an affair with a maid, and an 11-year-old boy asks his father for advice on matters of the heart.

After a freak bus accident during a mysterious global blackout, Jack wakes up to discover that The Beatles have never existed. Performing songs by the greatest band in history to a world that has never heard them, Jack becomes on overnight sensation with a little help from his agent.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Supernatural comedy about three New York parapsychology professors who decide to set up a ghost-catching agency. Soon a storm of malevolent spirits threatens to destroy the city, and the mysterious contents of a womans fridge suggest a paranormal Armageddon.

programme.desc: A modern-day teenager is transported back to the 1950s, where he encounters his mother and father in their youth.

programme.desc: Detective Sherlock Holmes and his stalwart partner Watson engage in a battle of wits and brawn with a nemesis whose plot is a threat to all of England.

programme.title: Blade Runner
programme.desc: An ex-cop sets out on the trail of androids who have mutinied in a bid to extend their limited lifespan and fled back to Earth.

programme.desc: A desperate and crazed man, with the help of an accomplice, takes a local Brooklyn bank hostage with plans to rob it in order to pay for his lovers sex-change operation.

It doesnt take long for Ryan to realise that only he can save Jessica - and her family - from the bad guys. She cant tell him her location, and his mobile battery wont last forever.

programme.desc: Based on three hybridising narrative strands, three groups of villains are intent on retrieving a missing diamond. Turkish and Tommy team up with a pugilistic Irish gypsy named Mickey for the purpose of rigging unlicensed boxing matches. However, their opponent also arranges some dodgy betting with the courier of the stolen diamond, who subsequently goes missing. To complicate further, a New York gangster arrives on the scene.

programme.desc: Enhanced CIA assassin Aaron Cross faces a battle to survive when his CIA employers decide to do away with his programme.

programme.title: Primeval

Cutter, Connor, Abby and Becker must return the sweet-looking but dangerous diictodons to the Permian era while dodging journalist Mick Harper, who is determined to expose the ARC and its secrets. Meanwhile, the others face an attack from Helen and her Cleaner Replicas.

programme.title: Fire Country
programme.desc: A box truck crashes into the station, causing a power outage and triggering a dangerous fire; Sharon and Bodes ex-girlfriend, Cara, face multiple medical emergencies.

programme.title: FBI: International

programme.title: Grimm

programme.desc: Action-packed documentary series following Britains cops in their war on crime.

programme.title: Monkeys and More: Our Closest Relatives

programme.title: Wild Canary Islands
programme.desc: When rocks engulfed by flames emerge from the middle of the ocean, new opportunities arise for the species that manage to reach them... This is the case of the Canary Islands, eight islands born from fire, that form an archipelago full of life.

programme.sub-title: World War I: Germanys Secret Gambles

programme.title: London: 2,000 Years of History

programme.title: Battle for the Skies: History of the RAF

programme.title: Battlefield

programme.title: Heroes of World War II
programme.desc: How the mathematical geniuses of Bletchley Park, otherwise known as Station X, cracked Nazi Germanys enigma code for the Allies.

programme.title: Weapons of World War II

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War
programme.desc: As the United States joins the conflict, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, with extreme costs. And, German civilians are touched by devastation.

programme.title: WWII: Battles Won and Lost
programme.desc: Battles in World War II occur anywhere at any time- in freezing temperatures, humid jungles, snowy hills, arid deserts; Allied and Japanese forces struggle through the steep, muddy terrain of the Kokoda track for control of Port Moresby.

programme.title: Secrets of WW2

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny feel awkward around each other after their romantic liaison. They agree to be friends but both find it hard to fight their attraction to each other. Meanwhile, Sheldon and Howard make a bet to determine a species of cricket.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.desc: Archaeologists Alex Langlands and Peter Ginn and historian Ruth attempt to bring Morwellham Quay in Devon back to life as it was in its Edwardian heyday. They prepare for the arrival of their first livestock, and Ruth cooks a sheeps head stew.

programme.desc: Marcus Wareing embraces a slower pace of life down at his Sussex smallholding. Setting out to expand the range of produce and bring in new livestock, his first additions are some new pigs, but he needs to choose animals that will provide him with the best possible meat. He heads to North Yorkshire to meet the rare Mangalitza pigs, who are famed for their deep flavour and fun personalities.

programme.title: Edwardian Farm

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: When his cousin Aubrey comes to stay, Clegg immediately calls for assistance to get rid of him. The man is a health fanatic and refuses to let Clegg join his chums for pointless, time-wasting walks in the hills. Aubrey soon discovers that while he is fit enough to beat Billy and Alvin at hill cycle racing, there is one challenge where they leave him standing - if only he could.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine

programme.title: Judge John Deed
programme.desc: An explosion in a laboratory kills an eminent scientist, and an animal rights activist, Henry Free, is put on trial for his murder. Charlie Deed is appointed as lead defence barrister in the case and Jo Mills reluctantly assists the novice Charlie, whose enthusiasm for Henrys cause leads her into unprofessional outbursts in court.

programme.title: Villages by the Sea
programme.desc: The small hamlet of Botallack was once at the centre of the Cornish tin and copper mining industry as archaeologist Ben Robinson discovers. By 1861, Botallacks mine was one of the biggest in the whole of Cornwall. Ben explores the villages mining past with archaeologist, Adam Sharpe, where he learns the mines produced millions and millions of pounds worth of copper and tin.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team issue a call to arms and recruit friends, family and local trades to put in their best efforts to help transform the homes and lives of families across Britain.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Supervet Noel Fitzpatrick helps a cocker spaniel puppy that needs hip replacements. A cat is rushed in with a smashed femur and shattered thorax after being hit by a car, while a dachshund has an exploded disc.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A hyperactive ridgeback has ankle problems, while a much-adored family dog has issues with hips, elbows and knees. Plus, a Havana kitten suffers a broken leg after a mystery accident.

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and his team set to work on transforming a derelict old boys club into a creative home for True Colours, a charity that provides children and young adults, whatever their abilities, with a space to express themselves.

programme.desc: Homeowners across Britain try to complete do-it-yourself home projects on their own. But sometimes, they need help finishing the work. Thats where presenter Nick Knowles and his team of designers and builders step in. They help homeowners complete their DIY projects gone awry.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: A woman fights for her life after being knifed by her former partner, while a teenager on her way to seeing two Youtube stars in a live appearance is felled by a falling tree.

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: Katie was separated from her boyfriend when she discovered her pregnancy but reunited at the first scan. Nicole is admitted with a significant bleed, and Jolanta is hoping her third child will be born underwater.

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: Two couples prove that unplanned pregnancies can happen at very different ages. Andy, whos 41, and Nina, whos 39, thought theyd long left nappies and sleepless nights behind. Jonathan, whos 21, met 18-year-old Laura when he randomly sent her a message on a social networking site. Three months later she fell pregnant.

programme.title: Nurses Down Under
programme.desc: Witness medical dramas through the eyes of the nurses, many from the UK, who work in three of Sydneys busiest hospitals.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Law and Disorder in Philadelphia
programme.desc: Louis Theroux joins the Philadelphia Police Department patrolling the most dangerous part of one of the most violent cities in America. Louis senses a society trying to contain a lawlessness born out of poverty and disaffection. Over time he sees a complex picture evolve - there are cops and robbers, guns and violence, but also an understanding between both sides.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Life on the Edge
Back From the Dead: Who Kidnapped Me?
programme.desc: Delimar Vera, kidnapped as a baby, is reunited with her family. Detectives issue an arrest warrant for the kidnapper, but they believe she didnt work alone - so who helped her?

programme.title: Michael McIntyres The Wheel
programme.desc: Michael McIntyre hosts a gameshow packed with huge stars, big laughs, and a giant spinning wheel. Three contestants hope to answer their way to a fortune, guided by tonights seven celebrities. Can Strictlys Shirley Ballas, DJ Jo Whiley and naturalist Chris Packham help them to win big? That all depends on the spin of The Wheel!

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Pets in need of Noels help include Wren a terrier cross breed with a severe foot injury. Talulah a 70kg newfoundland and Dave a French bulldog with a spinal deformity.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Pets in need of Noels help include fox red Labrador puppy Bertie with a leg injury, Jade a cat with a deformed back leg and Sophie a springer spaniel with a painful knee.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Pets in need of Noels help include Clumber Spaniel Scrumpy who needs a MRI scan on his back, Dachshund Ralph who is having trouble moving and Briard Buster who returns seven years after surgery.

programme.title: Nurses Down Under
programme.desc: The team must work fast when a young mans life is on the line as a lesion throws a potential lung transplant into jeopardy. Yoon and Darren race against time to save the life of a bariatric patient.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Law and Disorder in Lagos
programme.desc: Louis Theroux is in Lagos, following the local gangs, the so-called Area Boys, as they patrol their turf, clash with local rivals and keep the peace in a brutal and haphazard fashion. He gets to know the rich and glamorous Area Boy leader MC, a former street youth himself. On the side of the law, Louis rides with KAI, the governments Kick Against Indiscipline paramilitary task force.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Life on the Edge
Back From the Dead: Who Kidnapped Me?
programme.desc: A woman sees a young girl she believes is the baby she lost in a house fire six years earlier. The chance encounter triggers a police investigation and an astonishing discovery.

programme.desc: Amateur cooks from around Australia compete in a series of unique challenges judged by culinary experts and world-famous chefs.

programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: From the 250-year-old `new town of Helensburgh on the north bank of the Clyde, Michael Portillo takes his favourite West Highland Line across epic landscapes to Garelochhead and Ben Cruachan and thence to Connel Bridge and the waters of Loch Etive.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: From the fishing port and ferry terminal of Oban, Michael heads to the Hebridean archipelago. En route to the Isle of Mull, he watches eagerly for sea mammals in a stretch of water.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: A ride to remember caps this leg of Michael Portillos railway adventure up the west coast of Scotland. Aboard the Jacobite Express, he crosses the awe-inspiring Glenfinnan Viaduct.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.sub-title: Mallaig to Isle of Lewis and Harris
programme.desc: Michael reaches the terminus of the West Highland Line at Mallaig, from which he follows in the footsteps of Bonnie Prince Charlie over the sea to Skye. The island is renowned for wildlife, and Michael seeks out one of its most spectacular residents, the sea eagle. He is also lucky enough also to spot a school of dolphins.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Tucked away in the showroom is a WW2-era Willys Jeep. Its original condition means there might be a bunfight for a military vehicle thats ripe for restoration.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Up for auction this week is a 1980 Ford Escort, a hand-built 1946 Bedford 12 electric car, and a beautiful, red 1957 Austin Healey.

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.sub-title: The First Six Months in Power
programme.desc: Within the first few months in power, Goring eradicated the Nazis parliamentary opposition. These months also saw the rise of Henrich Himmler, the unassuming, uncharismatic head of an elite force of fanatical Nazis known as the SS.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team are at Crathes Castle in Aberdeenshire, looking at local items including signed Harry Potter books and ornate silver from Iona. There are also treasures from around the world: a German art deco figurine, an intricate Italian bracelet and a unique Brooklyn Dodgers baseball.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At Cromer seafront in Norfolk, the experts uncover some real treasures. Jewellery specialist Geoffrey Munn is thrilled by two pieces of exquisite Italian design, while a Chinese vase bought from a London market turns out to be a very special find.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Pauls on the East Coast to help a collector who is saying goodbye to his prized Excelsior Consort and his handmade Yorkshire Coble boat.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave is off to London where a couple of very special Fords, including a pristine Escort Cosworth, are hidden away in a garage.

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.sub-title: The First Six Months in Power
programme.desc: Within the first few months in power, Goring eradicated the Nazis parliamentary opposition. These months also saw the rise of Henrich Himmler, the unassuming, uncharismatic head of an elite force of fanatical Nazis known as the SS.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team are at Crathes Castle in Aberdeenshire, looking at local items including signed Harry Potter books and ornate silver from Iona. There are also treasures from around the world: a German art deco figurine, an intricate Italian bracelet and a unique Brooklyn Dodgers baseball.

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon is in the United States travelling down the Rocky Mountains from Montana to Colorado. In wide open prairies of Montana, the cowboy way of life is under threat from a long term decline in the rural economy but Simon meets a former Silicon Valley executive who has envisaged a new future for the land.

programme.title: Dom Chineas Cornish Workshop
programme.desc: Cornish newcomer Dom Chinea tries to fix a leaky sea pool near Mousehole. He buys a battered old Land Rover and starts a new project crushing waste concrete to fill potholes on his lane.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: On Sri Lanka, the Chinese are building a huge new port and their money has helped the Sri Lankan government bring a 30-year war to a brutal end. Simon Reeve also visits the north of the island - the scene of vicious battles between fighters from the Tamil minority and the Sri Lankan army. Heading north to Bangladesh, Simon investigates one of the Indian Oceans fastest growing industries - providing prawns.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Pauls on the East Coast to help a collector who is saying goodbye to his prized Excelsior Consort and his handmade Yorkshire Coble boat.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave is off to London where a couple of very special Fords, including a pristine Escort Cosworth, are hidden away in a garage.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Up for auction this week is a 1980 Ford Escort, a hand-built 1946 Bedford 12 electric car, and a beautiful, red 1957 Austin Healey.

programme.title: Agatha Christie Mystery Queen
programme.desc: Historian Lucy Worsley investigates the complex factors that shaped the dark imagination of a refined Devonshire lady, discovering family secrets and a childhood haunted by a sinister figure.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo crosses the Severn Estuary to begin a new railway journey along the south coast of Wales. Eschewing the train through the 19th-century Severn Tunnel, he joins maintenance workers on a hair-raising secret railway.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo continues his south Wales coastal railway journey in Barry Island, where he investigates `whats occurring at the busy docks. The waters upstream of the Barry Peninsula are tricky to navigate.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.sub-title: Port Talbot to Pembrey Burry Port
programme.desc: Michael Portillos rail adventure along the south coast of Wales reaches the town of Port Talbot, known across the world for its steel production. He marvels as tons of molten iron are poured into railway wagons for transport to the steel plant.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels the breathtaking rural coastline of Carmarthenshire and Pembrokeshire in south Wales. From Carmarthen Bay, he tracks up the estuary and River Towy to the historic town of Carmarthen and Middleton Hall.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek collects a beautifully restored and carefully modified 1936 Wolseley 14/56. Meanwhile, a Batman-inspired Chrysler Crossfire is dropped off at the Thornton le Dale garage.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Pauls doing the pick-ups in Lancashire where a rare 1960 Vauxhall Cresta PA Friary estate in dusky pink awaits.

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler had been chancellor of Germany for just under a year and it was a challenging balancing act. On the one hand the Nazis had to be be mindful of president Paul von Hindenburg and the vice chancellor Franz von Papen, who were members of Germanys traditional aristocratic and ruling elite.Then, there was the Nazis own power base, the stormtroopers, made up of millions of angry, disenfranchised men who wreaked havoc on the streets of Germany.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team are at historic Buckfast Abbey in Devon, commemorating 1,000 years of worship on the site. Alastair Dickenson is impressed by a tankard dating back to 1703 and Adam Schoon shows how a hidden lock in a 1640s iron chest would deter thieves.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team is at Concorde Hangar at the recently opened Aerospace Bristol museum. Items range from an intricate model of a vintage car made by a prisoner of war to an Elizabethan ring found in a muddy field and even a collection of classic guitars.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dereks grandchildren, Jack and Amy, head to the North East of England to pick up some charming old bikes. Derek helps a collector downsize and discovers a rare Chrysler Alpine.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Jacks drawn the short straw again as he attempts to shift a couple of 1930s Austin Sevens that have been stuck in the same spot for half a century.

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve continues his journey through the Americas. In this third leg of the journey Simon travels down the length of California. In northern California he explores the land of the giant redwoods, where he learns that only a fraction of old growth forest survives.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team head for restoration in their Bedford Rascal Campervan. They also purchase a true British classic - a TR6 - which is almost too good to touch!

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dereks charmed by a 1929 Rolls Royce Phantom with an unusual history, involving a WW1 hero and a tale of fraud.

programme.title: Agatha Christie: Lucy Worsley on the Mystery Queen
programme.desc: On the evening of 3 December 1926, Agatha Christie left her home in Sunningdale, Berkshire, in her Morris Cowley. The next morning, the car was found abandoned, balanced precariously on the edge of a quarry.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads to Scotland in the mother of all rainstorms to pick up a Jaguar E-type and a rare MGC convertible. Plus, Dave extracts a rare Austin Gipsey from a lock up.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dereks grandchildren, Jack and Amy, head to the North East of England to pick up some charming old bikes. Derek helps a collector downsize and discovers a rare Chrysler Alpine.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Jacks drawn the short straw again as he attempts to shift a couple of 1930s Austin Sevens that have been stuck in the same spot for half a century.

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler had been chancellor of Germany for just under a year and it was a challenging balancing act. On the one hand the Nazis had to be be mindful of president Paul von Hindenburg and the vice chancellor Franz von Papen, who were members of Germanys traditional aristocratic and ruling elite.Then, there was the Nazis own power base, the stormtroopers, made up of millions of angry, disenfranchised men who wreaked havoc on the streets of Germany.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team are at historic Buckfast Abbey in Devon, commemorating 1,000 years of worship on the site. Alastair Dickenson is impressed by a tankard dating back to 1703 and Adam Schoon shows how a hidden lock in a 1640s iron chest would deter thieves.

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve continues his journey through the Americas. In this third leg of the journey Simon travels down the length of California. In northern California he explores the land of the giant redwoods, where he learns that only a fraction of old growth forest survives.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team head for restoration in their Bedford Rascal Campervan. They also purchase a true British classic - a TR6 - which is almost too good to touch!

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dereks charmed by a 1929 Rolls Royce Phantom with an unusual history, involving a WW1 hero and a tale of fraud.

programme.title: Ishq
programme.desc: Four friends go against their parents wishes and marry for love instead of money.

programme.title: Darna Mana Hai
programme.desc: When their car breaks down, a group of friends spend the night in an abandoned house in the forest. To keep each other amused, they tell scary stories they have heard over bonfires.

programme.title: Tum Se Achcha Kaun Hai
programme.desc: Working as a Guide and bus driver in Jaisalmer, Arjun had always dreamed of being a famous singer. Will he be able to make his dream come true?

programme.title: IB 71
programme.desc: Indian intelligence officers embark on a high-stakes mission to counter two enemy nations conspiracy. If things go sideways, they must think on their feet to avoid a disaster.

programme.title: Chandni Chowk to China
programme.desc: Sidhu is on the lowest rung of society, cutting vegetables in a roadside stall. He longs to escape his existence and seeks a better future through fortune tellers and astrologers, never taking control of his own existence. Then, two strangers from China arrive and take him to China, claiming him to be a reincarnation of a war hero in the past.

programme.title: R... Rajkumar
programme.desc: Rajkumar, an aimless youth, works for a drug baron and is sent to kill a rival dealer. His life is changed forever when he meets Chanda, and has no idea she is the adopted daughter of the man he is supposed to kill.

programme.title: Yamla Pagla Deewana
programme.desc: A married Canadian travels to India to re-unite with his estranged father and brother but faces obstacles and challenges.

programme.title: Goliyon Ki Raasleela Ram-Leela
programme.desc: Romantic Drama inspired by William Shakespeares Romeo and Juliet. A young couples happiness is thwarted by their warring families.

programme.title: Stree
programme.desc: A town is held in the grip of terror by tales of a mysterious woman who calls men by their name and then abducts them, leaving only their clothes behind.

programme.title: Yeh Dillagi
programme.desc: Dreamy Sapna, the daughter of a rich familys chauffeur, fantasizes about wealth and romance. When the familys younger playboy son falls for her, his parents and his responsible, workaholic older brother Vijay vow to break the couple up. However, things quickly become complicated when Vijay finds himself developing feelings for Sapna as well.

programme.title: The Legend of Michael Mishra
programme.desc: As a child, Bhaiyyaji, a Bihari tailor-turned-kidnapper, falls in love with Varsa. When she moves to Mumbai to become an actress, he tries to shed his criminal image in order to win her back.

programme.title: Chandni
programme.desc: Rohit and Chandni become engaged in spite of their families refusal, based on their class differences, but when Rohit loses the function of his legs in a road accident, he leaves Chandni rather than placing a burden on her. Years later, Rohit has made a full recovery, and sets out to find Chandni, but when he does, she is engaged to another man.

programme.title: Patiala House
programme.desc: A second-generation Sikh in London gives up his dream to save his fathers reputation until he meets a girl who gives him the strength to stand up for what he believes.

programme.title: Silsila
programme.desc: Scriptwriter Amit and military pilot Shekhar are brothers and also very good friends. The latter is happily engaged to Shobha.
